listing_name: SPECTACULAR OCEAN VIEW MANILA BAY
description:
Immerse yourself in the vibrant city life. Experience spectacular sunset and sunrise in this spacious 3-bedroom Malate condo with stunning Manila Bay views. Comfortably hosting up to 6 guests, this 110 sqm apartment features 2 bathrooms and 2 balconies. This condo is best for a staycation and it offers convenience if you have business or personal matters to attend to around Manila.

Note:
The guests cover the electricity bill during the stay.
There will be a required deposit.

The space
This great 3 bedrooms condo unit in manila malate has a spectacular view of the ocean. it's a 110 sqm, 1,150 sqft apartment. it has 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms (the 1st bathroom is in the master bedroom while the 2nd bathroom is shared by the 2nd and 3rd bedroom) and is perfect for a maximum of 4 to 6 people to make the stay memorable.

It has 2 balconies with the greatest ocean view in town.

This is a luxury unit and but it is also a cheaper alternative to hotels.

Features:
Fully air-conditioned
Fully equipped kitchenette with gas stoves, fridge, microwave, rice cooker, kettle, plates, bowls, cutlery, glasses, & coffee cups
FREE unlimited DSL internet access
Prime fabric sofa
Queen-sized bed w/ sheets, blankets, pillows
King-sized bed w/ sheets, blankets, pillows
Dining table
Smart TV

Guest access
You could hit the gym and plunge into the pool.

Other things to note
DOCUMENTARY REQUIREMENTS
Each guest is required to send us a copy via Airbnb messenger, What's App, or email of the following:

Passport
note: the condo management requires it.


These documents are required by the condo management.

REQUIRED DEPOSIT:
PHP 5,000 for Damages
PHP 3,000 for Electricity

PLEASE BE NOTIFIED OF THE CHARGES:

*Rate is INCLUSIVE of water, cable, unlimited high-speed internet & condo dues
*Rate is NOT INCLUSIVE/EXCLUSIVE of electricity because it will depend on your aircon and other electricity usages. The cost is 15 PHP/Kilowatt Hour.


PLEASE BE NOTIFIED REGARDING: THE ELECTRICITY
The electricity will be computed based on the meter at check-in and checkout.
The price/rate is 15 pesos per kilowatt hour, more or less.

The security of the condo will be the one to make the reading upon check-in and check-out. After the reading, we will give you the electricity bill.

For reference: the electricity cost may be around PHP 400 to PHP 700 per day depending on use. Of course, you can save by turning lights and appliances when you are not using them.

CARE FOR THE UNIT:
Please take care of the unit as if it is your own.

REGARDING VISITORS:
As a general rule, visitors cannot sleep over. If you have some friends or families you want to invite, include them in the number of guests in your bookings. We will be made aware of visitors because they are required to logged-in at the security as part of the condo management rules. Remember that the unit is meant for 4 to 6 people to stay.

IMPORTANT: You may chill and unwind within the unit but please NO PARTY OR VOLATILE ACTIVITIES WITHIN THE UNIT THAT MAY CAUSE DAMAGES OR MESS IN THE UNIT. Again, please take care of the unit as if it is your own.

PLEASE BE NOTIFIED: ABOUT THE LAUNDRY
For your laundry needs, there is a laundry shop on the ground floor of the building. Our laundry room within the unit is not available. Please bear with us.

PLEASE BE NOTIFIED REGARDING: PEST CONTROL

Pest control may be conducted during your stay. We will inform you in advance when the scheduled pest control will be so that you can adjust to your stay. Pest control is important because we have had issues before with insects.

ABOUT TOWELS AND LINENS:
We change towels and linens every 6 days. If you want it more often you have to pay for it. In the unit, there will be towels and sheets for the guests. These are included in the price. If you have different needs and you would like to have more towels and change sheets, you have to communicate before getting in the apartment and will have a separate cost. Cleaning service during the stay isn’t included and can be organized on payment.

listing_name: Coco's Garden Manila
description:
The guest room is the downstairs bedroom in an authentic mid-20th century American-colonial style wooden home. We have furnished our place with Filipiniana antiques, so the ambiance is from that period. You will hear birds in the morning and church bells on Sundays.

The space
Coco's Garden Guest Room is a very large (75 square meter) accommodation in a charming vintage home in a quiet corner of the Paco District of Manila. Centrally located, Intramuros and Makati are but a few kilometers away. The guest room has its own restroom, with a sink, toilet, and shower. The room is airconditioned, with access and use of the house's kitchen, laundry, patio, and garden. The guest room has Cable TV and broadband internet. The room has a king-size bed good for 2, and a full-size bed can be added for a third person.

The local Robinsons mall has the usual fast-food outlets, while a little farther away at Paco Park you can find My Kitchen (Italian) and the Old Swiss Inn. If you're interested in a local cooking lesson, I can arrange a teacher (for a fee). Airport pickup/drop-off can be arranged for ($25 US each way).

Smoking is not allowed in the bedrooms, but is fine in the restrooms and the patio or garden.

Professional in-house massage by a local agency employing the blind is available.

If you need a car/driver, I may be able to assist you.

Guest access
As our guest, you will of course have your private room and private restroom. The rest of the home is shared space, including the kitchen, the living area, and the garden/patio.

During your stay
As you will be staying in our home with us, you can expect us to be available for your questions or needs related to your stay with us and your time in the Philippines.

Other things to note
We have 5 dogs and 3 cats, all of whom will seek your attention. They all live in the garden.

listing_name: Your Two Bedroom Vacation Home in Manila
description:
Welcome to your two-bedroom vacation home in Manila!

The condo unit is on the 30th floor - enjoy the views of the Manila Bay sunset in the bedrooms! It is fully air-conditioned and well-equipped with all the necessities of home. With its proximity to universities, it is steps away from all conveniences - stores, groceries, and transportation (Light Rail Transit, jeepneys, taxis, and tricycles).

Other things to note
Government-issued IDs are required for all occupants.

Guests can use the swimming pool. The gym is only for long-term residents of the condo, unfortunately. There are gyms steps from the condo.

The swimming pool fee of PHP300 fee/person/day (may change without notice) are paid directly to the property management staff.

description:
A 50 sq m, Netflix ready one bedroom PENTHOUSE FLOOR Bi-Level, furnished with kitchen, balcony & view of Manila Bay & Roxas Blvd, just across a 10-meter wide street to Robinson's Place Manila Ninoy Aquino International Airport is a 20 minute drive away... Perfect Location for US embassy interview applicants and Medical Appointment at St. Luke's Medical Clinic.

The space
A 50 sq m, one bedroom PENTHOUSE FLOOR Bi-Level, furnished with kitchen, balcony & view of Manila Bay & Roxas Blvd, just across a 10-meter wide street to Robinson's Place Manila Ninoy Aquino International Airport is a 20 minute drive away..

Malate Adriatico Grand Residences is right in the heart of Manila stands a benchmark of comfort and business-class luxury. Perfect Location for US embassy interview applicants and Medical appointments at St. lukes Medical Clinic. A Genuine Filipino Stay a comfortable bed, ambient and cozy lighting, thoughtful furnishing plus all the modern amenities you need.

It is very easy to catch taxis/ Grab car from this condo. if you are more adventurous you can try the Jeepney or pedicabs. The public Light Rail Transit (LRT) is great for going long distances.

Relax and Sleep comfortably on One Full Size Bed with Memory Foam Mattress and 2 Sofa Bed.

Guest access
FREE full access use of Recreational Amenities and Facilities located on the 5th Floor.
Swimming Pools
Sauna
Fitness GYM
Jogging Path
Covered Children's Playground
and a Roof deck.

Other things to note
House Rules
• No Smoking
• No Parties
• Quiet hours start at 10 PM
• Please turn off the air conditioner and lights when you’re not using them
• We kindly ask that you avoid cooking dishes with strong odors
• Please turn off the air conditioner while cooking
• Keep the linens stain-free to avoid extra charges

Check-out Info
• Check-out time is at 12 PM (noon)
• Please turn off the lights and air conditioner
• Let us know when you’re checking out
• Leave the keys with the lobby guard

Reviews
If you enjoyed your stay, we’d love to hear your feedback! Please leave a review.

Thanks so much for staying with us!

We’d really appreciate it if you could leave the unit in good condition.

listing_name: Hip 1BD, Amazing View, New World
description:
This renovated, fully equipped one bedroom apartment is adjacent to the New Coast hotel (formerly Hyatt Casino) . It offers all the comforts you will need in a home and is located at the heart of Malate's vibrant city life. It is also a haven for NON SMOKERS.

The space
Welcome to your new home at the heart of Malate. It is perfect for 2 people and has an additional sofa bed in the living room for an additional guest or two. It is a non-smoking unit. The building is adjacent to the former Hyatt Casino, now New World Manila Bay hotel,and just steps from the mall, laundry and numerous restaurants. The spectacular view of Manila Bay and its famous sunset will greet you daily.

This one bedroom, one bathroom apartment has a queen bed with orthopaedic mattress plus an additional sofa bed in the living room if needed. The kitchen has everything you will need if you wish to dine at home . The neighborhood of Malate has many food choices should you wish to dine out. We have fitted the unit with every modern comfort you will need in this mini suite-- wifi, cable television, brand new air-conditioners and appliances. The apartment is also just a stones throw from Robinsons Mall which should be able to provide you with all your shopping needs or a movie theatre to go see a show, as well as many restaurants.

Please take note this unit is NON-SMOKING.

Guest access
Guests of this apartment will have access to the condominiums swimming pool, gym , sauna if necessary.

listing_name: Stunning view at 43rd floor
description:
Located at the heart of Manila's bustling tourist belt. Best value condo complete with amenities such as fast internet, pool, gym, sauna, etc.

The space
Located at the heart of Manila's bustling tourist belt.

Guaranteed best value in Malate! Best value, low price!

25sqm (270sqft) fully furnished high end condo for rent. Self contained. Cable TV, fast internet (wired and wireless), relaxing view at 43rd floor, overlooking Manila bay and city view. Complete kitchenware (toaster, microwave, etc). Just a few steps to a world class shopping mall, restaurants and bars. With gym and pool facilities. Complete with amenities at a fraction of a cost. 24 HR security with cctv, safe deposit box inside the room.

Another important thing, my condo is equipped with hot and cold shower:) Hot and cold shower is not standard in the Philippines. I had this bad experience before when I booked a place in Cebu for one month, I mistakenly assumed that there is hot and cold shower only to find there was none. I have to suffer for a month because I already paid in advance:( So if you're looking for a condo, always ask the potential host, if it is not stated, don't assume as there is a high chance you will have to live with cold morning showers:). Just an unsolicited advise from a seasoned traveller:)

Very close to the major airport. Close proximity to Ocean park, walking distance to a 5 star casino (Hyatt hotel along Pedro Gil), just a quick taxi drive (8 mins) to tennis courts with instructors for only $8 per hour. Just about 20 mins taxi to a golf course. This place never sleeps. Bars and restaurants are just walking distance to each other (and to the condo) and are open almost 24 hours a day.

It is also walking distance (less than 5 minutes) to several 24/7 convenience stores such as Seven Eleven, Mini Stop, so you don't have to panic if you run out of soap, toothpaste or if you need a tablet of paracetamol to soothe your headache.

About 15 mins walk to US Embassy

5 min walk to Light rail transit (LRT) that will take you almost anywhere in Metro Manila. Other forms of transport such as jeepneys and taxis are everywhere.

There is something for everyone. For lovers of historical places visit Intramuros, the oldest place in Manila as old as the 15th century when Spain still rules the country.

Advantages of my condo over hotels:

1. My internet speed is 3MBPS and you are the lone user, average internet speed in the Philippines is 1MBPS. On hotels which provides wifi, you are lucky if you get 1MBPS not with so many people logged in at the same router. In many cases you only get less than 0.5 MBPS with frequent irritating drop out connections (most seasoned travellers in the Philippines will agree with me here). I'm just giving an honest advice that when you see a hotel advertising free wifi or even paid wifi, you can't count on it.

3. The view. My condo is at the 31st floor overlooking Manila Bay and Manila. At 3 star hotels, you have limited view with small window if you're lucky. If unlucky, your room will have no window.

4. The price. Mine is cheaper and what you see is what you get. With hotels, what you see on websites doesn't include taxes and other bills. So when you see a rate of hotels add 15% more and that is the actual rate you will pay.

5. My condo is complete with kitchenware, utensils, stove, etc. You can feel at home away from home. You can cook or prepare your own favourite food if you want. You don't have these amenities with hotels.

6. My condo building has gym facilities, outdoor swimming pool, and a sauna. 3 star hotels don't have these facilities. If you check in at 5 star hotels you will get these facilities at 3-5 times the cost of staying in my condo. That's why at my condo you get 5 star amenities at a fraction of a cost.

Disadvantages of condos in general compared to hotels.

1. There is no room service and inhouse restaurant. If you want food served in your room, you can't find that in condos. Although you can easily call fastfood restaurants and they will gladly deliver. Soap and toiletries are also not included but you can easily buy in front of the building from convenient stores open 24 hours.

2. Towels and bedsheets are not changed everyday. In my condo towels are changed every 2 days and bedsheets are changed once a week. In hotels they change everyday. However for an additonal small fee we can change your towels and bedsheets as often as you want even everyday. Just ask:)

3. Cleaning is done once a week in my condo while cleaning is done everyday in hotels. Although again for a small fee we can clean your room as often as you want.

Other things to note
PHP 300 deposit for key card access to the condo. Refundable upon check out and return of key card.

listing_name: Large modern 1 bedroom condo w/ balcony in Manila
description:
Large 54 sqm / 581 sq ft corner unit 1 bedroom w/ balcony in the heart of Manila City. Separate living room and bedroom. Modern and updated unit.

Walking distance to lots of places. 2 blocks Robinson's Place mall, Luneta/Rizal park. 10 min to Intramuros and Ocean Park. St Lukes extension clinic, Puregold grocery, Uncle John’s and 7-11 convenience stores, BDO and other banks, restaurants, starbucks, all in same block or just around the corner.

The space
Get comfortable, US length queen memory foam bed. Living room has a couch for 3 and an Ikea lounge chair. If you need to work, use our large office desk and office chair. Wifi. Complete kitchen and clothes washing machine.

The balcony has beautiful night time views of the city and warm sunrise.

Very comfortable for 2, but fits 4. Additional guests can sleep on our queen size pullout sofabed. Additional bed sets and pillows will be provided.

My condo is only available for 30 days or more. Longer term inquiries welcome.

Full-time 24-hour building security.
Secure keyless entry, electronic door pin pad with individual user numeric codes.
Hot water heater for the shower.
Split AC units in both rooms.
In unit clothes washing machine. Plenty of drying racks.
Medium size pin pad security safe in bedroom cabinet, big enough for tablets, cameras, wallets, passports. .4 cu ft.
Lots of storage.
Upgraded and renovated all the interior.

PLEASE NOTE: Our building admin requires an approval for ALL guests, booking requires 1 business day notice. Same day is available for local renters, but only if booked early in the day. description:
FLAT | 1-BR + Balcony
DESIGN | Modern + Nordic
LAYOUT | Corner Unit / 31 sqm

• Superhost - Airbnb award for exemplary host
• Near U.S. Embassy & Robinsons Mall Manila

Nearest Landmarks:
St. Luke’s Clinic Bocobo, UP PGH, Rachel Allen, Rizal Park, Roxas Boulevard, Ocean Park, Taft Avenue, National Museum, Intramuros, Remedios Circle

NO CARPARK
POOL & GYM - CLOSED / NOT AVAILABLE

**Newly Renovated / Remodeled last May 2025**

The space
This corner unit offers a vibrant take on modern Scandinavian style. Thanks to expansive windows throughout, every corner of the home feels bright, airy, and full of life.

• LIVING/DINNING SPACE:
The unit features an integrated living and dining area, including two couches and a table versatile enough for both work and dining.

• KITCHEN:
Furnished with a functional kitchen which includes: big refrigerator, electric kettle, rice cooker, microwave oven, cooking wares, induction stove, cooking pan, plates, utensils and glasses.

• WI-FI:
Equipped with Wi-Fi.

• BEDROOM:
The bedroom features one full double bed and one single bed, comfortably sleeping three. We provide fresh linens for every guest to ensure the highest standards of hygiene and a restful night's sleep. The room is equipped with split type air-conditioner and a flat screen television with ABS-CBN TV box (No Netflix, Only Local channels). You'll also find ample wardrobe space for your belongings.

• BATHROOM:
Bathroom essentials are provided such as towels, shampoo, tooth paste, bath soap and toilet paper. It is equipped with hair dryer, shower with hot water, and bidet.

• SECURITY:
For your security, the unit is fitted with a heavy-duty alloy steel door and a deadbolt. The property features 24/7 on-site security officers, and for added peace of mind, a government security outpost is located right next to the building.

• CONVENIENCE:
Everything you need is right at your doorstep. Located on the ground floor are a laundromat, BDO Bank, a medical clinic, and a 7-Eleven. Plus, Robinsons Manila is just a short two-block walk away.

• BALCONY:
The unit features a private balcony overlooking the stunning Makati business district skyline.

• PARKING:
None. I have no parking slot inside the building.

Guest access
A front-desk reception is available in the lobby to assist you.

Currently, the pool and gym are temporarily closed and unavailable. These facilities are subject to renovation and improvement.

Other things to note
IMPORTANT: Please read before booking --

The condominium admin requires all airbnb guests to bring the following:
• Photocopy of ID

About the Building:
Malate Bayview Mansion is a mid-rise residential condominium located in the heart of Manila, known for its accessibility, comfort, and security. ---

🏠 How to Get Inside the Building:

1. Building Name: Malate Bayview Mansion


2. Address: 1781M Adriatico Street, Malate, Manila, 1004


3. Upon arrival, please proceed to the lobby or front desk.


4. Present your valid ID and inform the staff that you are checking in under a short-term stay.


5. You will either be assisted by the receptionist or guided by our staff if prior coordination has been arranged.

1 folding table attached to the wall
4 folding chairs (can be hung inside the closet if more space is needed)'
1 luggage rack
1 bathroom with hot shower + pull away clothesline
towels (1 per guest)
Free bedroom slippers per guest
Free tootbrush and toothpaste per guest
hand soap
toilet paper and facial tissue
hair dryer
WIFI Internet
32 inch TV ( we have cable)
bidet in the bathroom

House Rules:
1. Strictly NO SMOKING in the building
2. Pets are NOT allowed
3. Each unit has a sensitive smoke detector so we suggest that everytime you cook (even rice), please use the exhaust fan. Also, when the water is on in the bathroom, please turn on the bathroom exhaust fan while you' re taking a shower
4. NO hanging of clothes on the window.
5. Avoid making loud noises especially at night.
6. Avoid frying fish (or anything that makes the room smell bad)
7. Trash may not be placed outside the unit. There is a garbage collector every morning, so when you hear the bell ringing, that is the only time that you can take the trash out.
8. PLEASE turn off the aircon/lights/TV everytime you leave the unit or if not in use.
9. Please do not lose your keys. Lost keys-500 php.
10. We only set up the bed if there will only be 2 people. If the 2 people do not want to share the bed, we will ask for a 300 php set up fee for the sofa bed.

VERY IMPORTANT:
For your own security, you will be asked to provide a scanned copy of a government-issued identification card (driver's license/passport)- all guests except children, upon confirming your reservation. Rest assured that all information contained therein will be kept confidential and will only be used by our friendly security personnel to identify you as our guests during your stay at the Green Residence.

Guest access
Guests who will be staying for 30 days or more can use the building amenities like gym, library and pool. BUT, they have to inform us in advance- at least 1 Philippine working day in advance because we need to inform the building administration.
For those guests who will stay less than 15 days and want to use the pool, the building administration requires each guest to pay 150 pesos per person per day.
FOR THOSE WHO WILL BRING THEIR VEHICLES, the building has a PAY parking but you have to go to the lobby first and inform the guard.

We are looking forward to being your hosts in Manila. You won't regret it :)

Other things to note
If you want to have your room cleaned, a fee of 650 php will be collected each time. Sorry, we cannot ask our unit manager to replace shhets or towels only. it has to be the whole package which includes cleaning, change if sheets, replacement of towels and replenishing toiletries and other supplies. There is a reasonably priced laundry shop next to the building if you want your clothes to be washed
We offer discounts for guests who like to stay for 1 month or longer.

listing_name: Green Residences Stay In Metro Manila by PBYY 1024
description:
Thank you for considering Green Residences Stays by PBYY! We’re excited to welcome you to our cozy 1 BR condo located in a prestigious SMDC building beside De La Salle University. Ideal for students, professionals, and travelers, it offers hotel-like comfort in the heart of Manila. Nearby spots include PGH, St. Luke's, US Embassy, Rizal Memorial Stadium, and Adventist Medical Center. Plus, enjoy easy access to Jollibee, 7-Eleven, local restaurants, and Green Mall downstairs. See you soon!

The space
Welcome to Our Accommodation!

We are thrilled to have you and want to ensure that your stay is both comfortable and convenient.

Our fully air-conditioned unit is thoughtfully furnished with everything you need for a relaxing visit. The kitchen is equipped with utensils and cooking essentials, including an electric water heater for your convenience. The room features a Smart TV and we provide reliable internet access, with the Wi-Fi password shared upon check-in.

For a restful night, the bedroom includes:

1 couple's bed (size 54x75)
1 bunk bed with 2 single beds
You’ll find ample storage space, an electric iron, and a vanity cabinet for your personal use. The private bathroom is fully equipped with a water heater, bidet, and complimentary toiletries available at check-in. Fresh towels and toilet paper are provided for your first use, along with clean slippers for added comfort.

We prioritize cleanliness and security while creating a cozy home-like atmosphere in the heart of Metro Manila. Enjoy free Wi-Fi, free linens, and fresh towels throughout your stay, with 24/7 on-call staff ready to assist you at any time.

If you have any further questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out. We hope you have a wonderful stay with us!

Guest access
Check-In Requirements:

Local Residents: A clear, non-expired government ID is required.
Foreign Guests: A clear copy of a valid passport is necessary.
Please ensure all IDs are valid and unexpired to process your check-in pass.

Amenities Overview:

Our unit is located in a complex with hotel-like amenities, including:

Grand Lobby
Outdoor Swimming Pool (subject to policies)
For long-term guests (6+ months), additional amenities include:

Student Lounge
Game Room
Wellness Center (Gym)
Note: Amenities policies may change without prior notice. For further details, please coordinate with property management.

Swimming Pool Use:

Last-Minute Bookings (Saturdays, Sundays, Holidays):

Pool use is subject to additional charges:
₱150 per person per day on regular days
₱300 per person per day on holidays
Pool Use Requests:
Requests must be submitted a day in advance for processing by the building administration. Keep in mind:

Admin office hours:
No work on holidays, Saturdays, or Sundays.
Requests on Fridays must be submitted before 3:00 PM.
Pool maintenance on Mondays:
No swimming allowed throughout the day.
If you plan to use the pool, feel free to contact us to ensure your request is processed on time.

Other things to note
Electricity Setup

We would like to inform you about our electricity setup in our units. Our electricity is powered by an electronic "KURYENTE LOAD" (LOADABLE) system provided by our electric power provider. In our commitment to offering you the best accommodation rates and promoting energy conservation, we have established a daily electricity load limit:

Staycation Guests: An allotment of Php 100.00 worth of electricity load per day is provided. This amount is consumable and can be multiplied depending on the duration of your stay. Once the allotted load is consumed, guests will be responsible for any additional electricity charges.

Long-Term Guests: For stays of 28 days or more, an initial allotment of Php 3,000 worth of electricity load will be provided. Once this load is consumed, guests will be responsible for covering the cost of any electricity usage beyond the initial allotment.

We kindly ask for your cooperation and understanding in conserving energy during your stay. Your efforts in energy conservation not only help preserve the environment but also enable us to maintain competitive accommodation rates.

Should you have any questions or concerns regarding our electricity load policy, please do not hesitate to reach out to our front desk or management team. We are here to assist you and ensure a comfortable and pleasant stay.

Incidental Deposit

An incidental deposit of Php 3,000 is collected upon check-in. This deposit is fully refundable upon check-out if not utilized, subject to a damage inspection of the accommodation.

Policies

Smoking: Smoking is not allowed in the entire building, with a penalty of Php 3,000 for violations.
Pets: Pets are not allowed, with a penalty of Php 5,000 for violations.
Parking: Paid parking nearby and on the premises is subject to availability and at your own risk.

listing_name: TinyLoft#A | 200mbps | Netflix | UST, FEU, PRC no.
description:
We converted an old commercial space into 4 private, self-catering, no-frills, loft-style apartments.

Our lofts are just a few blocks from UST, FEU, and popular review centers.

Just a 3-minute walk to/from UST's P. Noval Gate.

These lofts are designed for students, reviewees, OFWs (vacationing or working on their papers), board/bar examinees, couples, and people traveling to Manila for business or leisure.

Our Tiny Lofts have a low ceiling. It's not meant for tall people (6 ft or higher).

The space
We renovated an old commercial space into 4 Loft-Style Apartments.

Loft A is an 18sqm, Loft-Style Apartment that is FULLY FURNISHED with:

- Queen-sized (60x75) Bed with Linens and Pillows
- LED TV with NETFLIX and TV Plus
- Dining Table & Chairs
- Personal Refrigerator
- Complete Kitchenette with Utensils (Induction Stove, Rice Cooker, Electric Kettle, etc.)
- Bathroom with Towels and Toiletries
- Built-in Cabinets
- 1HP Window-Type AirCon
- High-Speed Wifi Internet

Maximum of 2 guests only.

Check-in : 2:00 pm
Check-out : 11:00am

This listing is a local, self-catering apartment (affordable, no-frills accommodations), not a hotel (no lobby, concierge, no room service, etc.). Do not book this listing if you want a hotel-style experience.

Unlike hotels, our apartments have a kitchen that enables our guests to cook/reheat their own meals.

This listing is not ideal for people who are taller than 6 feet.

This listing is located on street level, so there is no need to wait a long line for an elevator or walk a huge flight of stairs.

Guest access
Guests have access to their own private loft-style apartment.

Other things to note
The traffic situation in the Metro is not getting any better (well, not for while). Finding a place near your place of work/school/business/interest is one of the best decisions you will ever make whether you plan to stay in Manila for a week or for the long term. If you need a temporary place to stay within Manila's University Belt, particularly near UST, FEU, PRC and popular review centers, The Lofts at 1082 P Campa is the solution for you. Everything you will need is just a short walk away.

Our Tiny Lofts are located in the ground floor / Street Level. No need to walk a tall flight of stairs, however, being close to the road, you may hear noise from vehicles passing by.

Our Tiny Lofts have a low ceiling. It's not meant for tall people (6 feet or higher).

This listing is not a quarantine facility and it should not be treated as such.

Kindly provide the following requirements for each guest:

1. IDs
2. Contact tracing information
- Home Address
- Mobile number
- Email

You can attach them to our Airbnb conversation/messaging after you finalize your reservation.

ADDITIONAL RULES:

CAPACITY - Maximum capacity of 2 guests only. Any additional guest found staying on top of the first 2 guests will be charged P1,500/guest/night.

RIGHT TO REFUSE - We reserve the right to refuse accommodation or demands from rude, disrespectful, and/or discourteous guests. We will not hesitate to terminate your stay at our discretion if you continue to harass/verbally abuse our staff.

EARLY CHECK-INS are not guaranteed. Airbnb allows you to choose a preferred check-in time, but it is ultimately up to the host to approve any check-ins before 2pm. An accepted request to book does not mean your early check-in time was approved. You will need to MANUALLY send us a message asking us about our EARLY CHECK-IN options.

LATE CHECKOUTS must be approved by the management team. If you stay past your 11AM check out time without approval, you will automatically be charged for that listing's base nightly rate without discounts plus the reimbursement of any cost that we will incur in housing our next guest/s in another airbnb or a nearby hotel.

PARKING – FREE Street Parking is available along J. Barlin Street (first come, first served). Another option is the paid street parking along P. Noval Street. We (the host) are not responsible for anything that happens to your vehicle.

SMOKING - This is a non-smoking property. This includes vapes/e-cigarettes. Breaking this rule will result in a P5,000 fine and potentially the additional cost that is incurred by losing the next guest’s reservation because we cannot eliminate the odor in time for the next booking.

PARTIES - There is a strict no-parties/noise violation policy. This includes all Airbnb guests as well. If you throw a party, trash the space, damage the unit, disrespect the property, or have a gathering with extra guests that are not reported in your initial booking, you are breaking the rules and will be fined P10,000.

PETS - Pets are not allowed.

MAINTENANCE - Understand that we are at the mercy of the property management maintenance team for most general “fix-it” requests. We ask that all our guests are patient and understanding in regards to this. If a previous guest has damaged something minor and we were unable to fix it before check in, it will be reported to the complex staff, but it is dependent on the maintenance team’s schedule. Examples: blinds, curtains, and lightbulbs fall under the “non-emergency” maintenance category and won’t be completed until they’ve addressed any emergency requests around the property first.

CLEANING - Our cleaning fee is based on a courteous guest (e.g. someone who cleans up after themselves and leaves the place as they found it, etc.). This is NOT a hotel. If the housekeeping crew discovers an unreasonable mess post-checkout, we will charge an additional fee of P1,500. This listing has been cleaned and sanitized based on Airbnb’s standard. For your comfort, we continue the flow of air throughout the home which may include the A/C or ceiling fans. These factors may slightly alter the state of the home between the time the housekeeper has finished cleaning and the time you arrive. When you enter the listing, you are bringing in dust, debris, hairs, lint, and other particles. These particles may settle on surfaces within the listing. Please remember to empty the fridge before checking out. All left over food must be thrown into the garbage bin or you can opt to give it to our cleaner/s.

CONSERVE ENERGY - Conserve water and electricity. Turn off lights and aircon and unplug phone chargers when you are going to be outside for a long time.

COOKING - Light cooking is allowed, but please no deep frying, or anything that will produce lots of smoke. Clean the cooking & dining utensils right after every use so as not to invite insects & bugs inside the unit.

ALTERATIONS & CANCELLATIONS - We understand that sometimes plans change. However, please note that any requests for alterations that fall outside of the full refund window, as detailed in our cancellation policy, unfortunately, can't be accommodated. We highly recommend finalizing your booking details within this window to ensure a seamless experience.

If you break or damage anything inside the unit, please inform me immediately. No matter how small it may seem, I will appreciate it more if you will be honest and just apologize.

And lastly, please make yourself feel at home. Think of this place as your own...take care of it and enjoy it.

listing_name: Budget-Friendly Condo at SMDC Green Res, Taft Ave
description:
50th floor, Unit 5049

Budget-friendly condo at SMDC Green Res, Taft Avenue:
- Ideal for students and young professionals. Located just steps from De La Salle University, LRT-1 Vito Cruz Station, malls, and business hubs. - This cozy unit features a bright living area, functional kitchen, clean bathroom, and relaxing bedroom.
- Secure building with great amenities, perfect for end-users or investors seeking strong rental demand in a prime location.

- Move in and enjoy smart city living today!

The space
• Shower with water heater
• Super single bed, adjustable for 2 guests
• 32” TV with Sky Cable
• In-room Wi-Fi/internet (password at the bottom of the router)
• Free Wi-Fi/internet in the lobby
• Air-conditioned room (split-type unit)
• Refrigerator
• Dining table
• Induction cooker
• Fire extinguisher
• High-speed elevators
• 24-hour security
• Automatic fire alarm & sprinkler system
• Backup water supply

Property Management & Facilities:
• Sky lounge (common area)
• Study areas (common area)

Note:
• No extra bed allowed
• Light cooking only
• Please inform us if you wish to use building facilities; additional fees may apply as per admin
• Pool access is free for long-term stays only (6 months or more)
• The unit is near the elevator and trash area; please always keep the door closed for safety and hygiene

Guest access
• Study Room – common area
• Game Room – common area
• Gym – common area
• Function Rooms – common area (charges may apply as imposed by admin)
• Lap Pool – usage fees as set by building admin
• Kiddie Pool – usage fees as set by building admin

Other things to note
SMDC Green Residences Features
• Electricity top-up/load available at the lobby
• 12 elevators
• Automatic fire detection and alarm system
• Standby generator for common areas & select unit outlets
• Sewerage treatment plant
• Mailroom
• Garbage disposal area on every floor
• Commercial area on the ground floor

Additional Notes:
• The unit is near the garbage disposal area, so cockroaches may enter; please keep the door closed at all times.
• Garbage cleaning is managed by the building admin and is beyond our control.
• Neighboring units may also be affected.
• After cooking, clean all utensils and dispose of food waste immediately to prevent odors and pests.
• Before booking, please consider that occasional cockroaches from outside may appear, which is beyond our control during your stay.

listing_name: Penthouse Manila Bay View Mall 20mbps Wifi Netflix
description:
Most popular flat w/ best reviews in Manila, our penthouse studio offers a majestic view of Manila Bay sunset. Located in the heart of Malate, Manila, perfect for tourists, leisure and business travellers, or ‘balikbayans’.

Beside Robinsons Place mall. Near St. Lukes Extension, Intramuros, Lunera Park, National Museum, US Embassy, UP Manila, PGH, Supreme Court, Court of Appeals. Close to Binondo - Chinatown.

The space
This 25 sqm studio unit on the penthouse 5 level has a spectacular view of Manila Bay sunset. There is one queen-sized bed, and a semi-double sofa bed. It can comfortably sleep 3.

Unit is equipped with modern conveniences: Smart TV with HD cable and NETFLIX, High Speed 20mbps WIFI Internet, telephone for local calls, airconditioning, ref, microwave, rice-cooker, toaster, kettle, a Russell Hobbs coffee-maker with complimentary coffee, complete dinnerware for 4, induction stove for light cooking, hot water shower.

We provide fresh towels and linen, basic toiletries such as shampoo/soap.

In case you are looking for lower rates but with all the modern convenience and a superb location steps to LRT station, check out the other listings in our profile.

If you would like to take a side trip to Tagaytay, we got those too. Will give you a discount if you book there as well. Just ask. ;)

Guest access
Guests can use the amenities which includes swimming pool and gym.

Other things to note
If you will be staying for a longer period (more than a couple days) and wish to have the unit cleaned and towels/linen changed, we charge a cleaning fee of P1500. Please advise at least 24 hours before.

listing_name: 24F GRS Studio Suites Across US Embassy nr SLEC
description:
***UPDATED PHOTOS: FEBRUARY 2026

***Some photos taken with 0.5 settings to see the whole layout of the unit.

PLEASE READ FULL DESCRIPTION OF THE LISTING BEFORE BOOKING. THANK YOU❤️


Minimalist studio in the heart of Manila, with an area of 20.60sqm comes with basic cooking and kitchen utensils.

With a full size bed and a pull out single size bed.. Sitted on the 24th floor of the building facing manila city view.

*** INTERNET SPEED UP TO 30mbps

The space
(JUST VIEW MY PROFILE FOR OTHER UNIT AVAILABILITY)

The space is located at Grand Riviera Suites a condominium situated in Padre Faura St. corner Roxas Blvd Manila. It is across US embassy and 5mins walk to Robinsons Place Manila.

As the place is quite small around 20.60sqm, I have chosen the minimalist design to give a space for my guests specially with their bags and other stuffs more specially those from abroad.

It is equipped with full size (double size) bed with a single size pull out bed, ideally for 3 adults or 2 adults & 2small kids), a coffee table / dining table for two by the window with a beautiful view of manila skyline, port and some part of the bay, a cooktop, a cooking pan, a rice cooker, an electric kettle and also dining ware. I also provide a two door fridge (non-frost for easy cleaning), a microwave for heating and a hot shower. And some hangers too. There's also a vanity area with mirror.

I provide clothes steamer for your clothes.

For monthly stay electricity consumption is not included in the rent and shall be billed upon move out.

The room is sitted at 24th floor of the building with the view of Manila skyline and part of Manila Bay.

NOTE:

PLEADE SEE ALSO THE HOUSE RULES , OTHER THINGS TO NOTE, AND ADDITIONAL PRICE OF THIS LISTING

Please note that the lobby does not allow to leave your bags/luggages/packages at the lobby as part of their security protocol.

THANK YOU AND LOOKING FORWARD TO WELCOMING YOU!!!

Guest access
NOTE: BUILDING AMENITIES (SPECIALLY THE POOL) IS NOT GUARANTEED OPEN AND USEABLE DURING YOUR STAY.(CLOSED EVERY MONDAY FOR POOL CLEANING) IF THIS IS VERY IMPORTANT DURING YOUR STAY, PLEASE ADVISE ME FIRST BEFORE YOU BOOK. THANK YOU

Amenities

Lap pool (8am to 8pm)
Kiddie pool
Guest lounge
A nice lobby

‼️GYM AND GAME ROOM EXCLUSIVE FOR UNIT OWNERS ONLY.

5 mins walk to US Embassy
5 mins walk to robinsons manila
5 mins walk to UP
10mins to St Luke's extension
12mins walk to World Health organization
10-15mins walk to Light Trail Station (LRT) U.N and Pedro Gil Station

Beside the building there are 24/7 ministop and 7/11 convenient store. Coffee shops like starbucks and coffee bean, some of the chinese restaurants, army navy burgers, pancake house, are just few meters away.

For parking space:
-Along Roxas Blvd and Padre Faura Street in front of the building, street parking rates starts at 50 pesos
-Robinsons Mall Manila (5-8mins walk)
- Sunny Bayview Open Parking Space along Roxas Blvd. (8-10mins walk)
Pay parking and first come, first serve basis. Rates starts at 50.00 pesos. Overnight rates starts at 150 pesos.

Banks is also very accesible such as BDO, UCPB, BPI, east west, PNB, RCBC and more.

Mall of Asia is only 15 to 20 mins ride.

Airport is 30-40mins ride.

Other things to note
Electricity consumption for monthly rent is not included in the rent. Utility deposit for electricity consumption of 3,000 pesos will be collected for guests staying for one month or more. The security deposit for electricity is consumable and refundable in excess of electricity consumption.

Strictly 3pm onwards for check-in to give way to checking out guest/s and check out until 12:00nn only to give way to the coming guest (unless the coming guests will arrive late than check in time we can allow to check out late until 1pm only). After 1pm 200/hr will be charged.

Self check- in (hotel like check-in, instruction will be given once the booking is confirmed). My staff will be around 11:00am to 5:00pm, but available anytime for any urgent concerns. You could also reach me anytime thru Airbnb or thru mobile.

Any damage made by the guest/s in the property shall be settled before the check out.

Note that Cleaning fee is for after check out and not during the stay. If you wish to request for cleaning during your stay we charge for the same fee here or lesser. For guests staying weekly or monthly, We only change the beddings and towels once a week for free but you may request for change of towel anytime for a fee of 100.00/towel and 250.00 for new set of beddings. Visitors are welcome but expected to obey house rules, any violations/damaged by the third party shall be guest's responsibility. No staying at night time for visitors unless paid as extra occupant. Our place is located just in front US Embassy and few mins from robinsons place manila. It's along Roxas Blvd corner padre faura st ermita.

Please also note that there will be times that the internet connection might not be available due to technical problem or under maintenance by the provider for several reasons which is not under our control.

In this case, the host is not liable for any partial refund in times like this. Thank you for understanding and enjoy your stay!

It's perfect for solo travelers, reviewers, and those needing a place to stay in the city for business, holidays, or for study. The room is part of a 2-room condo where I live, with a clean, modern shared bathroom and fast, reliable wifi. Enjoy facilities such as a huge pool and a well-equipped gym. ajoramos@gmail.com

listing_name: 47F Elegant studio across US Embassy nr Ocean Park
description:
PLEASE READ FULL DESCRIPTION OF THE LISTING BEFORE BOOKING. THANK YOU❤️

New furnished studio to accommodate guest coming to Manila esp to US embassy, St Luke's extension, cultural places like intramuros, rizal park and others. Our place is fully equipped with the basic stuff for cooking, towels and short term stay. We can accommodate up to 4 pax including kids. Free wifi and cable internet. With an area of 20.60sqm.


*** INTERNET ISSUE HAS BEEN RESOLVED AS OF OCT 14,2023

The space
The space is located at Grand Riviera Suites a condominium situated in Padre Faura St. corner Roxas Blvd Manila. It is across US embassy and 5mins walk to Robinsons Place Manila.

As the place is quite small around 20.60sqm, I have chosen the minimalist design to give a space for my guests specially with their bags and other stuffs more specially those from abroad.

It is equipped with full size (double size) bed with a single size pull out bed, ideally for 2 adults, a coffee table by the window with a beautiful view of manila skyline, port and some part of the bay, a cooktop, a cooking pan, a rice cooker, an electric kettle and also dining ware for four. I also provide a two door fridge (non-frost for easy cleaning), a microwave for heating and a hot shower. And some hangers too. There's also a vanity area with mirror.

I also provide towels and extra beddings if needed.

But unfortunately I don't provide flat iron for some security reason which had happened in the past guest but there is a laundry shop in the next building for a minimal cost.


For monthly stay electricity consumption is not included in the rent and shall be billed upon move out.

The room is sitted at 47th floor of the building with the view of Manila skyline and part of Manila Bay.

NOTE:

PLEADE SEE ALSO THE HOUSE RULES , OTHER THINGS TO NOTE, AND ADDITIONAL PRICE OF THIS LISTING

Please note that the lobby does not allow to leave your bags/luggages/packages at the lobby as part of their security protocol.

THANK YOU AND LOOKING FORWARD TO WELCOMING YOU!!!

Guest access
NOTE: BUILDING AMENITIES (SPECIALLY THE POOL) IS NOT GUARANTEED OPEN AND USEABLE DURING YOUR STAY.(CLOSED EVERY MONDAY FOR POOL CLEANING) IF THIS IS VERY IMPORTANT DURING YOUR STAY, PLEASE ADVISE ME FIRST BEFORE YOU BOOK. THANK YOU

Amenities

Lap pool (8am to 8pm)
Kiddie pool
Guest lounge
A nice lobby

‼️GYM AND GAME ROOM EXCLUSIVE FOR UNIT OWNERS ONLY.

5 mins walk to US Embassy
5 mins walk to robinsons manila
5 mins walk to UP
10mins to St Luke's extension
12mins walk to World Health organization
10-15mins walk to Light Trail Station (LRT) U.N and Pedro Gil Station

Beside the building there are 24/7 ministop and 7/11 convenient store. Coffee shops like starbucks and coffee bean, some of the chinese restaurants, army navy burgers, pancake house, are just few meters away.


For parking space:
-Along Roxas Blvd and Padre Faura Street in front of the building, street parking rates starts at 50 pesos
-Robinsons Mall Manila (5-8mins walk)
- Sunny Bayview Open Parking Space along Roxas Blvd. (8-10mins walk)
Pay parking and first come, first serve basis. Rates starts at 50.00 pesos. Overnight rates starts at 150 pesos.


Banks is also very accesible such as BDO, UCPB, BPI, east west, PNB, RCBC and more.

Mall of Asia is only 15 to 20 mins ride.

Airport is 30-40mins ride.

Other things to note
Electricity consumption for monthly rent is not included in the rent. Utility deposit for electricity consumption of 3,000 pesos will be collected for guests staying for one month or more. The security deposit for electricity is consumable and refundable in excess of electricity consumption.

Strictly 3pm onwards for check-in to give way to checking out guest/s and check out until 12:00nn only to give way to the coming guest (unless the coming guests will arrive late than check in time we can allow to check out late until 1pm only). After 1pm 200/hr will be charged.

Self check- in (hotel like check-in, instruction will be given once the booking is confirmed). My staff will be around 11:00am to 5:00pm, but available anytime for any urgent concerns. You could also reach me anytime thru Airbnb or thru mobile.

Any damage made by the guest/s in the property shall be settled before the check out.

Note that Cleaning fee is for after check out and not during the stay. If you wish to request for cleaning during your stay we charge for the same fee here or lesser. For guests staying weekly or monthly, We only change the beddings and towels once a week for free but you may request for change of towel anytime for a fee of 100.00/towel and 250.00 for new set of beddings. Visitors are welcome but expected to obey house rules, any violations/damaged by the third party shall be guest's responsibility. No staying at night time for visitors unless paid as extra occupant. Our place is located just in front US Embassy and few mins from robinsons place manila. It's along Roxas Blvd corner padre faura st ermita.

Please also note that there will be times that the internet connection might not be available due to technical problem or under maintenance by the provider for several reasons which is not under our control.

In this case, the host is not liable for any partial refund in times like this. Thank you for understanding and enjoy your stay!

listing_name: Staycation in Manila (2 min. walk to Robinson's)
description:
Our location is wonderfully situated in the heart of Manila.

8Adriatico is a few minutes away from notable landmarks like Intramuros, National Museum, Rizal Park, and the breathtaking sunsets of Manila Bay. We are also a stone’s throw away from Philippine General Hospital, Supreme Court, Department of Justice, and the University of the Philippines.

Since we are centrally located, cabs and jeepneys are found outside the building. The LRT is also within walking distance of the building.

The space
Our 27. sq.m space is located at the 35th and has:
- Queen- Sized Bed and a floor mattress (for the additional guest)
- Unlimited Internet Access
- Smart TV (With Netflix and Amazon Prime)
- CD player/Radio
- Hot Shower
- Kitchen (with electric stove, microwave oven, rice cooker and refrigerator )
- Basic cookware (pots and pans)
- Glass, plates, and silverware
- Toiletries
- Towels and Extra linens (for longer stays)
- Ample- sized dining table can double as a working table
- books

Guest access
1. Send me a copy of your ID and companion;
2. These will be submitted to the Building Manager for your clearance;
2. The approved move-in clearance will be sent to you;
3. Show the clearance to the guard on duty, and they will assist you in getting the key from the mailbox.

Other things to note
Please note that this condominium is a shared space, and as such, there is a possibility of encountering insects due to shared ventilation and drainage systems. While we take measures to maintain a clean and comfortable environment, occasional insects may appear. We appreciate your understanding and encourage guests to keep this in mind when booking.

description:
Green Residences
Accessible, Safe and Secure, Five Star Amenities,
Unit is 15.63 sq. meters and located on the 53rd floor
Has the view of the city
Fully Furnished Condo Unit
Location: Taft, Manila (Beside De La Salle University Taft)

Has nearby bars and restaurants
Ground floor supermarket (SaveMore)
Near the LRT stations (Vito Cruz and Quirino LRT)

The space
15.63 sq/m studio unit, with double deck and pull-out bed, Size- 36x75 inches
TV (USB with movies is provided).
Dining table with 2 chairs
Stylish stool
Shower heater
Intercom
Microwave oven
Electric kettle
Kitchen utensils, plates, cups and saucers, pots, and pans
Refrigerator
Split type AC
Towels and Bath Essentials

Guest access
**Guest Access**

Swimming pool may be used for only PhP 150 per day per person on regular days, and PhP 300 per day per person during holidays. Guests can pay directly to the Payment Center at P5.

Other things to note
Other things to note:

1. check-in time is 2pm, check-out time is 12:00 noon. Self Check-in

2. Security & Registration Details

- IDs are checked by security officers for the safety of all occupants.
- Guests are required to send us an image of their IDs (with photo) after booking is confirmed by Airbnb. We will do a pre-registration for the guests.
- Upon arrival, guests are required to sign in the logbook. There will also be a photo taken by the camera installed in the concierge area.
3. Same Day Booking -If it is not a public holiday, we can accept last-minute booking or same day booking. If we receive your booking on or before 10 AM, we can allow check in time of 2 PM. However, for booking 10 AM onwards, check-in time is at 4:00 PM to give us time to prepare the unit for late booking.
4. Concierge located at the lobby is 24/7.
5. An intercom is available inside the unit.

7. The place is accessible to all means of transportation and guests can choose which one to take in getting around Manila, Makati and nearby places.
8. For tourists, historical landmarks, shopping areas are just nearby.

listing_name: City Escape With Friends
description:
Swimming Pool is open everyday from 8AM-9PM.
Free Parking space available in first come first serve basis.


This listing is for two spacious Bed & Breakfast rooms that can accommodate up to 4 people each. The rooms are connected by a connecting door. So it's like one big room!

This listing comes with the following inclusions:
- Free and Unlimited Fiber-Optic WiFi Access
- Free and Unlimited In-House Movies via Netflix
- Free Pool Access
- Free Plated Breakfast for Four

The space
This listing is a cozy two bedroom Bed and Breakfast room with a rustic interior design that compliments the relaxing atmosphere by our swimming pool. This listing has two private bathrooms, two mini fridges, and a 32" Flat-Screen Television in each room where you can enjoy your Free and Unlimited In-House Movies.

To clarify - this listing does not come with a kitchen. But not to worry! Come send us an inquiry, and will send you a special offer for one of our apartments with a kitchen, private dining room, and bedroom (The price will be a slightly different).

For reservations that are three nights or more - we offer complementary housekeeping upon request (every other day).

Laundry service is also available until 4:00pm (closed on Sundays). Just bring your laundry to our lobby in the morning around 8:00am, and we will send it over to our partner laundry service. It will be ready for you the next day. (minimum of 6 kilos, 250 pesos).

Guest access
Our guests have access to all our common areas (All Areas are 100% WiFi Accessible):
Swimming Pool (8:00am - 9:00pm)
Dining Hall (7:30am - 10:00am)
Deck Overlooking the Pool - Smoking Area (24/7)
Lounge - Smoking Area (24/7)

Other things to note
1. Our location is not along the main road. Please view the location guide that we will send you after your reservation (It's just 5 short photos!)

2. Our WiFi security is quite strong, and sometimes blocks devices from accessing the internet. Don't worry, we can have it fixed within seconds! Just inform any staff member, and we will have it fixed in no time.

3. The Hairdryer and Iron is available upon request. Kindly inform us when you'd need it, and we will have it delivered to your room immediately!

4. Parking is subject to first come, first serve. Not to worry, if ever parking is full - we can allow you to park along our driveway, which is protected by our gates and 24/7 security.

listing_name: Charming Room|55” SMART TV|Netflix
description:
Experience luxury in this suite inspired by modern contemporary hotels. Located on the 43rd floor of Tower 1 at Sun Residences by SMDC, it offers stunning panoramic views of Quezon City. Positioned in the heart of the city, you'll enjoy easy access to top attractions, dining, and entertainment. This is your perfect urban retreat, blending sophisticated design with an unbeatable location.

The space
Welcome to our stylish studio unit, thoughtfully furnished with brand-new appliances for your comfort.

Bedroom:

Queen-size bed and a pull-out foam (accommodates up to 4 guests)
Remote-controlled aircon
Fresh bed sheets, comforters, and fluffy pillows
Extra fleece blankets available upon request
Flat iron and ironing board
Living and Dining:

43" Smart TV with Netflix

Netflix is already set up on the TV. If you find that you’re not logged in, please message us, and we’ll guide you through the process. We use 5 profiles on one account to accommodate other guests, so for uninterrupted viewing, we recommend using your own Netflix account.



2-seater sofa
Coffee/dining table with accent chair
Stand fan
Intercom to lobby reception
Lamp shades

Kitchen:

Refrigerator
Microwave
Rice cooker
Electric kettle
2-burner electric stove with range hood
Cooking pots, pans, and kitchenware
Cutlery and kitchen towels


Bathroom:

Enclosed shower with heater
Bidet and toilet paper
Soap and shampoo
Bath and hand towels
Hair dryer

Guest access
Feel free to use my things and handle them with care
With (located @ 6th floor)
*swimming pools
*spacious lobby
*study area
*jogging path
*gym
*playground area
*garden and gazebos

Other things to note
-Once booking is confirmed, we require our guests to send us a copy of Valid ID of every staying guest as this mandatory requirement of the building admin and security. This will ensure a smooth and hassle-free check in.

-on Visitors & Airbnb guests Policy
As part of the condo policy they are very strict in regards of people entering the building. If you have any visitor/s please let us know and send IDs of them prior to visit so we can process the authorization letter needed. Please note that maximum of 4 persons are only allowed to stay in the room at a time including aironb guests listed.

As Airbnb guest/s we are also giving you the copy of your own authorization letter for you to re enter the building. Guards may check this everytime you enter, just saved a digital copy of that on your phone. Coz sometimes it maybe hassle for you to check everytime you enter, but please note that this for your security and for all the people staying in the building. You may notice the (card pass) used by the residents or long term tenants of the building. They don't issue this to airbno guest/s.

This may help you to what will you expect and for us to make sure that everything will be followed as the admin of the condo has their own rules and policies. Thank you for understanding.

-One time set up of Linens, towels and Toiletries.

- Extra sheet and blanket will provide upon request or if guests is 3-4 guests.

- Number of towels and basic toiletries will set up according to the number of guests declared.

-Swimming pool has a FEE of 150php per head per use during regular days/ weekends
And 300php per head per use during holidays.
(Maximum of 2 persons only)
if you wish to swim on holiday or weekend, kindly inform us, since the admin closed during this time, so we can buy tickets prior.

-Gym rate:
Ordinary days- P150 per person/ day
Holidays-$300 per person/ day
Maximum 2 guest per unit po
Time: 6 AM to 3 PM only.

Parking is available at España Blvd. between SM
Hypermarket and Starbucks, first come first serve po, 40php for first 2 hours plus 20php

And there is a pay parking also at Tower 1 of sun residences, 30 pesos per hour then plus 300 if overnight.

Dispose trash responsibly, few steps from the room (left side,there is a fire exit where the garbage room is located).

Smoking is STRICTLY PROHIBITED.
Keep our place clean and tidy.
Switch off appliances if you're not using them.

other things to note
[Shortening of nights and rescheduling]

Within 48 hours of booking and more than 1 week before check-in
Acceptable.We will refund the difference due to shortening and rescheduling.

Less than 1 week before check-in
You will be asked to pay half of the number of days that have been shortened and
rescheduled. Payment will be after you check out.

listing_name: Malate Bayview Mansion 30R
description:
REQUIREMENT FOR CHECK-IN:
Photocopy of ID/passport

There is no parking area in the building but there are paid street parking available that's managed by the city government.

The space
This fully furnished studio type apartment in Bayview Mansion Manila is located in Malate, the Heart of Nightlife in the Philippines. The space is equipped with kitchen appliances. This is a perfect place to stay with its proximity to museums, clubs and parks.

This property is only 5-minute-walk away from Robinsons Manila and is very close to Convenience Stores. There are also a lot of restaurants around the area with Korean, Japanese, Chinese to American menu.

The room is fully air-conditioned and equipped with strong Wifi connection. Basic essentials such as towels, bed sheets, soap, shampoo, and toilet paper are also provided. The unit is also fully-furnished with mini-kitchen, refrigerator, automatic washing machine, and TV. Below is the list of features inside the unit.
LCD TV
Netflix access
VERY STRONG WIFI
Microwave
Electric kettle
Electric ceramic stove
Simple cooking utensils
Water heater - warm water only
Washing machine
Hair dryer
Steam iron upon request
Free daily cleaning service upon request

PLEASE NOTE:
Stays for 14 days and more require ₱10k deposit.
Deposit will be returned upon check out if there are no damages.

Guest access
Pool, gym, and game room use is to be paid by the guest at the admin office (7th floor).
Pool - 150 per person
Gym - 150 per person
Game room - 150 per person

Other things to note
Only electric cigarettes are allowed
Please be patient with the elevator as it's pretty slow
The building is a little old so please don't expect much from its amenities

description:

Utensils are also sterilize and dipped with our food grade disinfectant. We also provide disinfectants and alcohol during your stay. All sheets are changed and sterilized between stays. listing_name: Stay Amare Green DLSU Lorenzo
description:
Stay is experience. Capture and share a different and memorable one at Stay Amare.

A comfortable and convenient stay at centrally located Green Residences Condominium right beside De La Salle University on Taft Avenue, Malate, Manila. Fully furnished and decorated with original paintings of Raul Agas and Antonio Ylanan, this one bedroom condominium unit at the 29th floor can accommodate 4 guests enjoying up to 30 Mbps internet speed and Netflix and cable channels on Samsung UHD Smart TV.

The space
(Please check the House Rules for Covid 19 Requirements before booking our place.)

Our condo is a 28 sq.m. one bedroom unit designed and furnished with great comfort in mind. We stay here when our family is in Manila. This property is similar in size and design with our other property, Stay Amare Green DLSU Kristina, in the same building.

The bedroom is furnished with a hotel quality full size bed with first class mattress protector, duvet, bed linens, and soft pillows. The living area is fitted with a first class sofa that can be converted into a full size bed.

Other amenities are the following:
- Up to 30 Mbps wireless internet
- 40" Samsung UHD Smart TV with cable channels and Netflix subscriptions
- Condo intercom
- Dining table up to 4 people
- Open shoe rack and enclosed shoe rack/utility cabinet
- Well-equipped modern kitchen with induction cooktop, range hood, 8.6 cu.ft. ref, rice cooker, toaster, blender, electric kettle, tableware, cutlery, stainless steel and non-stick pans, casserole, wok, steamer, etc
- Hot and cold shower with body wash, shampoo, hair conditioner, body lotion, and towels
- Emergency first aid kit inside the toilet
- Emergency flashlight
- Knob-operated bidet and wall mounted bidet
- Iron and Ironing board
- 1.5 window type air conditioning unit
- Work station
- Cabinets with a number of hangers
- Original oil and acrylic paintings of various sizes
- Carpeted


Green Residences is a residential condominium standing in between LRT1’s Quirino station and Vito Cruz station. Its ground floor houses SM Savemore supermarket and various restaurants. A few steps away are Jollibee, Mc Donalds, Kenny Rogers, Tapa King, Starbucks, Bo’s Coffee, Mercury Drug, 711, Korean and Japanese restaurants, BDO and BPI banks among other establishments.

Individually programmed RFID cards are used for restricted condo access.

Parking is available at 5th parking floor. Overnight parking is P350.00.

We listed this property on Airbnb on 6 July 2018 and made it available starting on 20 July 2018.

Guest access
A maximum of two registered guests can access for a fee the swimming pool area at any given time.

Our parking slot at the 5th floor can be used for a fee and with prior arrangement with the condo admin. Car registration documents should be emailed to me at least a day before check in.

The gym and study area are only for the exclusive use of the unit owners.

Other things to note
Check in time is at 3PM onwards
Check out time is strictly until 11AM

Self Check-in. The RFID access cards corresponding to the number of registered guests can be retrieved at mailbox 2930 in the mailbox room behind the concierge at the lobby area.

Number of guests allowed entry. In the interest of safety and security, only registered and booked number of guests are allowed entry into the residential units. Each registered guest will be given the RIF access card to gain entry into the residential area. Each access card can only be used by one person.

Valid ID’s required. All booked and registered guests should email their valid government issued ID’s at least a day before check in and before a key box code is given.

This is Airbnb and this is our home. Please take respect, treat, and take good care of it like it is your own.

listing_name: #2 on 40th floor @ 8Adriatico +pool+NetFlix50mpbs
description:
25m2 condo with stylish design and full gym, pool, security amenities, and views of the Manila skyline for a spectacular stay in Malate. The amenities and bedding matches 3-4* hotel. Full disclosure. WiFi is globe and 90-95% reliable but there are outages. This is Philippines and there is occasional bug. You need a booking of >4.95 to be 100% bug free.

The space
Hey guys. I’m trying my best to provide what I want, and hope it satisfies you too. A big bed with 100% cotton sheets and cotton towels. Cold AC, wifi and Netflix. A small fridge for drinks and the occasional leftovers. Also the large pool and small fitness center are both available. What I don’t need, don’t want and don’t charge you for [nor provide ;)] are fancy shampoos, conditioners, lotions, coffee or water. My assistant came up with toiletry kits with soap, toothbrush and shampoo. It is Philippines and my apologies in advance for the occasional unexpected event like a bug or a slow wifi. I think there’s a hair dryer each unit but only 1 rice cooker between two units. The condo is equipped with a REAL Queen size bed 78"x60" (filipino Queen size beds are only 75" long and inadquate for most westerners) AND a pullout full size trundle bed 75”x54”. The Queen bed has a brand new 3” memory foam mattress topper as of September 1. Inform the host if you plan to use the trundle bed so it will be prepared 500 pesos. All sheets, duvet and towels are 100% cotton. The linens are 220-800 count cotton. There is an LG 43” 4K TV with Netflix subscription (new router installed April 11). There is a ceiling fan and air conditioner for your comfort. There are blinds and BLACKOUT curtains (as of September 1) to dim the unit in the day to enable rest after a long flight or travels. There are dishes, hotplate, and microwave for light cooking.

Guest access
The condo building provides Front Desk, Lobby, Security, and Maintenance. My guests can use the outdoor Swimming Pool and Gym Studio on the 6th floor. There is a kiddie pool, and white chase lounge chairs as well.

There is a pay garage parking lot located at the back of the building.

The Studio is cleaned and sanitized after every guest. Bed linen, and towels are freshly washed. Soap and shampoo provided. But don’t forget your toothbrush.

My cleaner and assistant, and building security are prepared to provide guests with a comfortable, healthy, and safe stay at 8 Adriatico. We offer gym and pool amenities only seen at 4* hotels in Manila buy at a fraction of the price!

Other things to note
Trundle bed has an additional charge of ₱300 pesos; this is one time charge to cover the additional wash of sheets and towels. A low price compared to hotels that charge 500 pesos per person per night.
Competitive low price aligns with other abb’s as follows: 2 towels, top and bottom sheet, 2 pillows. Towels and sheets are 100% cotton which exceeds other ABB’s.

The Philippines is a tropical country, with temperatures usually around 30 °C.
Because it’s an island nation, the humidity is always high. So, don’t expect the temperature inside a room to be as low as 16 °C.

Many guests who come here immediately set the air conditioner to 16 °C. But honestly — who really wants it that cold? I don’t know anyone who truly enjoys freezing indoors. When it’s too cold inside and the air outside is hot and humid, problems can occur. Warm, moisture-filled air entering the room can cause condensation on walls, TVs, and electronics — and that’s not good. Over time, it can even lead to mold. It can also make you feel unwell when moving between a very cold room and the hot, humid outdoors.

That’s why air conditioners here are limited to cooling no lower than 22 °C. Even if you set it to 16 °C, it will simply cycle on and off once it reaches 22 °C. If 22 °C isn’t cool enough for you in the middle of a tropical country, maybe it’s time to take off the long pants and winter jacket. Put on shorts and a T‑shirt, and enjoy the beautiful warm weather we have here.

Our rooms also have some automation features. For example, if you keep the balcony door open ( You cant cool whole planet) or start cooking (oily steam and smoke can damage the aircon), the air conditioner will automatically turn off. It will also switch off when no one is in the room (room can survive without AC), thanks to our AI system. After you close balcony door, stop cooking or you enter back to room. Ac automatically start again. This saves a lot of energy.

If this automation causes you any inconvenience, just let us know. We can disable it for you, but in that case, we’ll arrange for you to cover the electricity costs and AC cleaning.

listing_name: TinyLoft#B | 200 mbps | Netflix | nr UST, FEU, PRC
description:
We converted an old commercial space into 4 private, self-catering, no-frills, loft-style apartments.

Our lofts are just a few blocks from UST, FEU, and popular review centers.

Just a 3-minute walk to/from UST's P. Noval Gate.

These lofts are designed for students, reviewees, OFWs (vacationing or working on their papers), board/bar examinees, couples, and people traveling to Manila for business or leisure.

Our Tiny Lofts have a low ceiling. It's not meant for tall people (6 ft or higher).

The space
We renovated an old commercial space into 4 Loft-Style Apartments.

Loft B is an 18sqm, Loft-Style Apartment that is FULLY FURNISHED with:

- Queen-sized (60x75) Bed with Linens and Pillows
- Large 42" LED TV with NETFLIX and TV Plus
- Dining Table & Chairs
- Personal Refrigerator
- Complete Kitchenette with Utensils (Induction Stove, Rice Cooker, Electric Kettle, etc.)
- Bathroom with Towels and Toiletries
- Built-in Cabinets
- 1HP Window-Type AirCon
- High-Speed Wifi Internet

Maximum of 2 guests only.

Check-in : 2:00 pm
Check-out : 11:00am

This listing is a local, self-catering apartment (affordable, no-frills accommodations), not a hotel (no lobby, concierge, no room service, etc.). Do not book this listing if you want a hotel-style experience.

Unlike hotels, our apartments have a kitchen that enables our guests to cook/reheat their own meals.

This listing is not ideal for people who are taller than 6 feet.

This listing is located on street level, so there is no need to wait a long line for an elevator or walk a huge flight of stairs.

Guest access
Guests have access to their private loft.

Other things to note
The traffic situation in the Metro is not getting any better (well, not for while). Finding a place near your place of work/school/business/interest is one of the best decisions you will ever make whether you plan to stay in Manila for a week or for the long term. If you need a temporary place to stay within Manila's University Belt, particularly near UST, FEU, PRC and popular review centers, The Lofts at 1082 P Campa is the solution for you. Everything you will need is just a short walk away.

Our Tiny Lofts are located in the ground floor / Street Level. No need to walk a tall flight of stairs, however, being close to the road, you may hear noise from vehicles passing by.

Our Tiny Lofts have a low ceiling. It's not meant for tall people (6 feet or higher).

This specific Loft has no windows.

This listing is not a quarantine facility and it should not be treated as such.

Kindly provide the following requirements for each guest:

1. IDs
2. Contact tracing information
- Home Address
- Mobile number
- Email

You can attach them to our Airbnb conversation/messaging after you finalize your reservation.

ADDITIONAL RULES:

CAPACITY - Maximum capacity of 2 guests only. Any additional guest found staying on top of the first 2 guests will be charged P1,500/guest/night.

RIGHT TO REFUSE - We reserve the right to refuse accommodation or demands from rude, disrespectful, and/or discourteous guests. We will not hesitate to terminate your stay at our discretion if you continue to harass/verbally abuse our staff.

EARLY CHECK-INS are not guaranteed. Airbnb allows you to choose a preferred check-in time, but it is ultimately up to the host to approve any check-ins before 2pm. An accepted request to book does not mean your early check-in time was approved. You will need to MANUALLY send us a message asking us about our EARLY CHECK-IN options.

LATE CHECKOUTS must be approved by the management team. If you stay past your 11AM check out time without approval, you will automatically be charged for that listing's base nightly rate without discounts plus the reimbursement of any cost that we will incur in housing our next guest/s in another airbnb or a nearby hotel.

PARKING – FREE Street Parking is available along J. Barlin Street (first come, first served). Another option is the paid street parking along P. Noval Street. We (the host) are not responsible for anything that happens to your vehicle.

SMOKING - This is a non-smoking property. This includes vapes/e-cigarettes. Breaking this rule will result in a P5,000 fine and potentially the additional cost that is incurred by losing the next guest’s reservation because we cannot eliminate the odor in time for the next booking.

PARTIES - There is a strict no-parties/noise violation policy. This includes all Airbnb guests as well. If you throw a party, trash the space, damage the unit, disrespect the property, or have a gathering with extra guests that are not reported in your initial booking, you are breaking the rules and will be fined P10,000.

PETS - Pets are not allowed.

MAINTENANCE - Understand that we are at the mercy of the property management maintenance team for most general “fix-it” requests. We ask that all our guests are patient and understanding in regards to this. If a previous guest has damaged something minor and we were unable to fix it before check in, it will be reported to the complex staff, but it is dependent on the maintenance team’s schedule. Examples: blinds, curtains, and lightbulbs fall under the “non-emergency” maintenance category and won’t be completed until they’ve addressed any emergency requests around the property first.

CLEANING - Our cleaning fee is based on a courteous guest (e.g. someone who cleans up after themselves and leaves the place as they found it, etc.). This is NOT a hotel. If the housekeeping crew discovers an unreasonable mess post-checkout, we will charge an additional fee of P1,500. This listing has been cleaned and sanitized based on Airbnb’s standard. For your comfort, we continue the flow of air throughout the home which may include the A/C or ceiling fans. These factors may slightly alter the state of the home between the time the housekeeper has finished cleaning and the time you arrive. When you enter the listing, you are bringing in dust, debris, hairs, lint, and other particles. These particles may settle on surfaces within the listing. Please remember to empty the fridge before checking out. All left over food must be thrown into the garbage bin or you can opt to give it to our cleaner/s.

CONSERVE ENERGY - Conserve water and electricity. Turn off lights and aircon and unplug phone chargers when you are going to be outside for a long time.

COOKING - Light cooking is allowed, but please no deep frying, or anything that will produce lots of smoke. Clean the cooking & dining utensils right after every use so as not to invite insects & bugs inside the unit.

ALTERATIONS & CANCELLATIONS - We understand that sometimes plans change. However, please note that any requests for alterations that fall outside of the full refund window, as detailed in our cancellation policy, unfortunately, can't be accommodated. We highly recommend finalizing your booking details within this window to ensure a seamless experience.

If you break or damage anything inside the unit, please inform me immediately. No matter how small it may seem, I will appreciate it more if you will be honest and just apologize.

And lastly, please make yourself feel at home. Think of this place as your own...take care of it and enjoy it.
