listing_name: Great View! 1-BDRM w/ Balcony + Netflix @ Manila
description:
A scenic 1-bedroom w/ balcony, 24-hr security, WiFi, Netflix & hot shower. From the unit’s balcony, you’ll enjoy the amazing Manila Bay sunset view right in the old city’s historical and cultural locale. The location beside the prestigious De LaSalle University, is close to SM Mall of Asia, World Trade Center, Cultural Center, the US embassy & Manila City Hall. A grocery, ATM’s & restaurants are on the building’s ground floor. Swim in a lap pool as your exercise for short stays.

The space
Well-spaced and professionally styled, this 28 square meter(301 sq. ft) 1-bedroom unit with terrace has the feel of a posh hotel room. Whether traveling on business or enjoying time out on your staycation, unlimited WIFI, Netflix and cable TV, gives you the option to binge watch your desired TV series and movies or stay on top of the latest news or your business. The bedroom with double bed and pull-out bed, provides spacious privacy while living and dining areas can cater to 4 people. A sofa bed good for 2 people in the living room adds more sleeping space as well.

The fully functional kitchen has all your needed household appliances such as electric stove, microwave, coffee maker, water heater, rice cooker, refrigerator. Cookware - pot and frying pan, cooking and dining utensils and drinking glasses/cups are available for your convenience if you want to cook and dine in. Various restaurants on the ground floor of the building and nearby areas are readily accessible for your dine out experience.

For your convenience, a flat iron with board and hair dryer are available in the bedroom cabinet.. making work morning preparation easy and quick...

The West-facing balcony outside the bedroom lets you cap your day with the world famous Manila Bay sunset in all its fiery glory while sipping your favorite drink comfortably nestled in a porch chair — it can also serve as your lounge to start your evening get-together with a view of the city lights...

In addition, the building has 24-hour security personnel and CCTV cameras to further enhance the secure university environment.

Guest access
Swimming pool access for all guests at a minimal fee of P150 per person per day for regular days and P300 for holidays.

Gym, game room and study area are available for extended stay guests (more than 28 days).

Pool, gym and game room are open 6AM-10PM while the study area is open 24 hours.

Other things to note
The property management security measures require electronic access cards or paper passes to be used during entry and exit. These will be processed 3 days prior your arrival (assuming no interim holidays or weekends) so please send pictures of your photo IDs - strictly local government IDs for Filipinos and passports for foreigners. Due to COVID-19, we will need vaccination cards/certificates or swab test results will be required. Last minute check-in is not doable for Saturday or Sunday entry since there would not be enough time to complete health and security requirements. The access cards should be returned upon check-out. Lost cards will incur a replacement cost of P300.00 per card.

CHECK-OUT is 11AM.
* LATE CHECK-OUT: Check-out beyond 11AM is subject to room availability (when no guests are booked after your stay) and our cleaning schedules. We reserve the right to refuse late check-out requests if they will impact our cleaners and incoming guests.
* EARLY CHECK-OUT: Please inform us at least one day before if you plan to check-out earlier than the standard check-out time.

CHECK-IN 2PM-6PM.
*EARLY CHECK-IN: Early check-in may be accommodated if there are no guests booked the day before and depending on our cleaning schedules. We may charge an additional fee if early check-in requests are accommodated on a last-minute basis. Communication on changes in check-in time is needed to avoid delays.
*LATE CHECK-IN: We accommodate late check-in beyond 6PM upon special request and will confirm agreed upon time. If you are more than 1 hour late with respect to the agreed time without any notification to us, we will need to charge extra for indefinite waiting time by us or our staff. Self check-in option is available if you are unsure of your check-in time.

The unit does not allow washing and drying of clothes. Laundry shops are available in the area when needed.

Pay parking during the day time in the complex is on first come first served basis. Pay parking area open from 6AM-11PM. Overnight parking in the complex is available for a fee. Nearby pay parking areas beside Starbucks and 7-11 stores are available.

Public transportation such as taxis and the iconic “jeepneys” are readily accessible outside the lobby.

Cleaning or linen replacement can be requested during your stay and an additional cleaning fee may be charged. Please inform us ahead of time for schedule of cleaning or housekeeping requests as we want to ensure your privacy and will not enter the unit without your expressed approval.

Garbage room is available. It is located in the hallway between the elevator waiting area and our unit.

The Philippines is a tropical country, with temperatures usually around 30 °C.
Because it’s an island nation, the humidity is always high. So, don’t expect the temperature inside a room to be as low as 16 °C.

Many guests who come here immediately set the air conditioner to 16 °C. But honestly — who really wants it that cold? I don’t know anyone who truly enjoys freezing indoors. When it’s too cold inside and the air outside is hot and humid, problems can occur. Warm, moisture-filled air entering the room can cause condensation on walls, TVs, and electronics — and that’s not good. Over time, it can even lead to mold. It can also make you feel unwell when moving between a very cold room and the hot, humid outdoors.

That’s why air conditioners here are limited to cooling no lower than 22 °C. Even if you set it to 16 °C, it will simply cycle on and off once it reaches 22 °C. If 22 °C isn’t cool enough for you in the middle of a tropical country, maybe it’s time to take off the long pants and winter jacket. Put on shorts and a T‑shirt, and enjoy the beautiful warm weather we have here.

Our rooms also have some automation features. For example, if you keep the balcony door open ( You cant cool whole planet) or start cooking (oily steam and smoke can damage the aircon), the air conditioner will automatically turn off. It will also switch off when no one is in the room (room can survive without AC), thanks to our AI system. After you close balcony door, stop cooking or you enter back to room. Ac automatically start again. This saves a lot of energy.

If this automation causes you any inconvenience, just let us know. We can disable it for you, but in that case, we’ll arrange for you to cover the electricity costs and AC cleaning.

The kitchenette is equipped with all your essentials including a functional oven with four electric stoves, a microwave, a rice cooker, a refrigerator, a coffee maker, along with plates and utensils for your use.

We have a small dining set / work desk with storage nooks, along with an intercom to communicate with the front desk and maintenance should you have any issues. A very fast WiFi (200mbps). Landline is also available for local number and Globe number.

Our bathroom is equipped with a brand new electronic bidet, a bathroom mirror, a shower enclosure and a shower heater for your leisure. Your usual toiletries are also included.

(The electronic bidet’s buttons are written in english. Toiletries include towels, shampoo and soap.)

The studio unit is sanitized after every check-out. All linens, toiletries, spreads and essentials are replaced for future guests.

It is very quiet in the unit, no noise disturbance from the outside.

For guests staying more than 7 days, room cleaning with a bed linen change can be scheduled once a week for an extra charge. New towel can be provided for free once a week if stay is more than 7 days.

I will welcome you upon arrival, but in case I'm not available, you'll be self checking in. Late check-ins and early check-outs are accommodated provided that we are advised prior to booking approval and considering the guest before and after your stay. The Front desk lobby is available 24 hours a day for assistance.

Guest access
The condominium provides 24/7 Front Desk, Lobby, and Security; Maintenance; and a Medical clinic. The guests have free access to the gym and the swimming pool.

Parking is not provided, but there are pay-parking lots right outside the building. Robinson’s Manila charges 400-500PHP (about $10) for overnight parking, while Cherry Blossoms hotel charges around 300-400PHP (about $8) per night.
*above prices are not guaranteed.

Other things to note
REMINDER: Each guest must show their valid I.D. at the front desk upon arrival/before checking in. The unit could accommodate up to 2 guests comfortably. An additional guest is accepted for an extra fee (extra floor single mattress). Visitors are strictly not allowed in the unit.

A security deposit is allotted for the safety of the unit, but no worries! AirBnB doesn’t charge the security deposit unless damage has been incurred by the guests upon check-out.

Check in time is flexible (as early as 12nn onwards if no other guest staying on that day). If there is, earliest check in will be 2pm onwards to give us time to clean and sanitize the room. Though you could leave your luggage as early as 12nn.

Late check outs (after 12nn) will be allowed for an extra fee as long as there are no other guests booked on that day. Please let me know in advance if you plan to extend your check out time.

VERY IMPORTANT: Please read the check in manual once booking is confirmed.

listing_name: Award-Winning Bed and Breakfast
description:
Swimming Pool is open everyday from 8AM-9PM.
Free Parking space available in first come first serve basis.


Our hidden oasis may just be exactly what you need to escape the hustle and bustle of the city without ever leaving Manila!

Here are the inclusions of this listing:
- Free Breakfast for Two (Plated)
- Free Swimming Pool Access
- Free Netflix Access
- Free Fiber-Optic WiFi Access

The space
This listing is a cozy Bed and Breakfast room with a rustic interior design that compliments the relaxing atmosphere. A private bathroom, a mini fridge, an electric kettle, and a 32" Flat-Screen Television where you can enjoy your Free and Unlimited In-House Movies.

To clarify - this listing does not come with a kitchen. But not to worry! Come send us an inquiry, and will send you a special offer for one of our apartments with a kitchen, private dining room, and bedroom (The price will be a slightly different).

For reservations that are three nights or more - we offer complementary housekeeping upon request (every other day).

Laundry service is also available until 4:00pm (closed on Sundays). Just bring your laundry to our lobby in the morning around 8:00am, and we will send it over to our partner laundry service. It will be ready for you the next day. (minimum of 6 kilos, 250 pesos).

Guest access
Our guests have access to all our common areas (All Areas are 100% WiFi Accessible):
Swimming Pool (8:00am - 9:00pm)
Dining Hall (7:30am - 10:00am)
Deck Overlooking the Pool - Smoking Area (24/7)
Lounge - Smoking Area (24/7)

Other things to note
1. Our location is not along the main road. Please view the location guide that we will send you after your reservation (It's just 5 short photos!)

2. Our WiFi security is quite strong, and sometimes blocks devices from accessing the internet. Don't worry, we can have it fixed within seconds! Just inform any staff member, and we will have it fixed in no time.

3. The Hairdryer and Iron is available upon request. Kindly inform us when you'd need it, and we will have it delivered to your room immediately!

4. Parking is subject to first come, first serve. Not to worry, if ever parking is full - we can allow you to park along our driveway, which is protected by our gates and 24/7 security.

If you want extend your stay for an hour, we charge 100 pesos per hour if the room is still available. Ask more early so we can blocked the room for your hours to extend.

The Philippines is a tropical country, with temperatures usually around 30 °C.
Because it’s an island nation, the humidity is always high. So, don’t expect the temperature inside a room to be as low as 16 °C.

Many guests who come here immediately set the air conditioner to 16 °C. But honestly — who really wants it that cold? I don’t know anyone who truly enjoys freezing indoors. When it’s too cold inside and the air outside is hot and humid, problems can occur. Warm, moisture-filled air entering the room can cause condensation on walls, TVs, and electronics — and that’s not good. Over time, it can even lead to mold. It can also make you feel unwell when moving between a very cold room and the hot, humid outdoors.

That’s why air conditioners here are limited to cooling no lower than 22 °C. Even if you set it to 16 °C, it will simply cycle on and off once it reaches 22 °C. If 22 °C isn’t cool enough for you in the middle of a tropical country, maybe it’s time to take off the long pants and winter jacket. Put on shorts and a T‑shirt, and enjoy the beautiful warm weather we have here.

Our rooms also have some automation features. For example, if you keep the balcony door open ( You cant cool whole planet) or start cooking (oily steam and smoke can damage the aircon), the air conditioner will automatically turn off. It will also switch off when no one is in the room (room can survive without AC), thanks to our AI system. After you close balcony door, stop cooking or you enter back to room. Ac automatically start again. This saves a lot of energy.

If this automation causes you any inconvenience, just let us know. We can disable it for you, but in that case, we’ll arrange for you to cover the electricity costs and AC cleaning.

description:
Experience Manila at a fraction of of the price at Green Residence Taft Avenue.

The property is located right beside De La Salle University and it's a few minutes away from many restaurants and attractions including: Cultural Center of the Philippines, Philippine International Convention Center, SM Mall of Asia, Luneta Rizal Park, National Museum, Robinsons Place Manila, US Embassy, Philippine General Hospital, China town, Divisoria, Fort Santiago, University town etc...

The space
Our unit has one bedroom with a living area and a small kitchenette. There is a washing machine in the bathroom and a water heater for the shower. The room has AC and a ceiling fan to help during hot months.

There is space to sleep a maximum of 4 people. There is a bunk bed with a pull-out trundle bed in the main bedroom and a convertible sofa bed in the living area.

Green Residence has a Savemore right outside the lobby for those who decide to cook their meals. There is a sizeable fridge that can be used to store groceries.

Pay parking is available at P1 (spots go fast) and a private parking slot for a fixed daily rate upon request (availability changes, make sure to ask before booking if this is a must-have).

Other things to note
The Property is a No-Smoking area, no smoking policy is observed in all common areas within the property.

If applicable, swimming pool may be used by the authorized guest(s) provided they pay the corresponding fees (₱150). Pool useage fee is paid at the Admin office. Posted swimming pool rules and regulations shall be strictly followed by all authorized guests.

For security and safety purposes, guests will go through bag check-up procedures upon arrival at the property.

For safety and security purposes, the residential property shall not be used as an office, boarding house, dormitory, transient or other “bed space type” establishment.

The unit can accommodate a maximum of 4 people (regardless of age). Building management strictly enforces this and provides no exemptions. The Airbnb app currently has bugs and does not include infants in the pax count. The error has been addressed with them and is currently being worked out (Nov2023).

Guests who are non-Filipino citizens are required to provide passports as required by the building administration.

description:

Our studio couples bed unit, situated in one of SMDC's prestigious condominiums, offers hotel-like accommodations in the heart of Metro Manila. We take pride in our prime location, providing simplicity and authenticity to enhance your stay.  We extend a warm welcome to our budget-friendly accommodation! We are thrilled to have you choose our 16-square meter Studio Unit for a restful night.

Our studio is equipped with practical amenities to enhance your comfort. The double bed 54 x 75 allows for a cozy and efficient use of space, ensuring a good night's sleep. Ample storage space, an electric iron, and a vanity cabinet are provided for your convenience during your stay.

In the bathroom, you'll find a water heater and bidet, adding to the overall comfort of your experience. Toiletries will be thoughtfully provided upon check-in, and we've included fresh towels and complimentary toilet paper for your first use.

For your convenience within the unit, we've also included clean slippers, allowing you to relax and make the most of your time here. If there's anything specific you need or if you have any questions, our staff is ready to assist you.

Guest access
Please send all guest valid ids for us to process your check in pass.
For local residents, a clear and non-expired government ID is required, while foreigners are requested to provide a clear copy of their passport. Please ensure that the identification documents are valid and unexpired.

Our unit is part of a complex with hotel-like amenities, including a grand lobby, outdoor swimming pool (please refer to our policies), and 24/7 convenience stores and restaurants nearby. Long-term guests ( 6 months or more ) can also enjoy additional facilities like the student lounge, game room, and wellness center (gym). Please coordinate property for amenities policy . Please note that our amenities policy is subject to change without prior notice. If you have any questions or require assistance, don't hesitate to reach out to our property management team.

*SWIMMING POOL ( Under Maintenance until April 08, 2024 or until further notice )

Valued Guests,

POOL USE FOR LAST MINUTE BOOKING DONE ON SATURDAYS & SUNDAYS AND HOLIDAYS:

Be reminded that pool use is
subject to additional charges:

150php per person per day (regular days)
300php per person per day (holidays)

Pool use are requested to our building admin. As such, we require you to submit your request a day before so we can process it ahead of time. Take note that our building admin do not work on holidays, Saturdays and Sundays. On Friday, we can only process it until 3:00 P.M. only. Make sure you inform us of your requests before the holidays and weekend. If you want to use the pool, please don’t hesitate to contact us.

Note: Mondays are reserved for pool maintenance. Swimming cannot be scheduled throughout the day.

Other things to note
Dear Valued Guest,

We hope this message finds you well. We would like to inform you about our electricity setup in our units.

Our units' electricity is powered by an electronic "KURYENTE LOAD" (LOADABLE) system provided by our electric power provider. In our commitment to providing you with the best accommodation rates and promoting energy conservation, we have set a daily electricity load limit.

For our staycation guests, we have allotted Php 100.00 worth of electricity load per day. This amount is consumable and can be multiplied depending on the duration of your stay. Once the allotted load is consumed, guests will be responsible for shouldering the additional electricity load.

For long-term guests staying for 28 days or more, we will initially allot Php 3,000 worth of electricity load. Once this load is consumed, guests will then be responsible for covering the cost of the electricity load beyond the initial allotment.

We kindly ask for your cooperation and understanding in conserving energy during your stay. Your cooperation not only helps in preserving our environment but also allows us to continue offering competitive accommodation rates.

Should you have any questions or concerns regarding our electricity load policy, please do not hesitate to reach out to our front desk or management team. We are here to assist you and ensure you have a comfortable and pleasant stay with us.

*INCIDENTAL DEPOSIT
We collect incidental deposit of Php 3,000 upon check in, this deposit is fully refundable upon check-out if not utilized and subject to a damage inspection of the accommodation.

-Smoking is not allowed in the entire building, there is a Php 3,000 penalty.
-Pets are not allowed, penalty of Php 5,000
-Paid Parking nearby and in the premises is subject for availability and at your own risk

Other things to note
Stay in the Heart of Manila – Steps from Robinsons Place Mall!
Welcome to our cozy and stylish space, conveniently located right beside Robinsons Place Mall (less than a minute’s walk from the Padre Faura entrance). Whether you're in Manila for sightseeing, shopping, or business, our place offers unmatched accessibility to the city's top attractions:

Intramuros (5-10 min by car) – Walk through Manila’s historic walled city, home to Fort Santiago, San Agustin Church (a UNESCO Heritage site), and charming Spanish-era streets.
Rizal Park (Luneta Park) (5 min by car, 10 min walk) – A historic urban park dedicated to the country’s national hero, perfect for a morning stroll or a cultural experience.
National Museum Complex (5 min by car, 15 min walk) – Discover Philippine history, art, and culture in this renowned museum district.
Manila Ocean Park (10 min by car) – A world-class marine theme park featuring ocean tunnels, interactive exhibits, and aquatic shows for all ages.
Manila Baywalk (5 min walk) – Enjoy stunning sunsets along the scenic waterfront, with open-air restaurants and cafes nearby.
Mall of Asia (MOA) (15-20 min by car) – One of the largest malls in Asia, offering an extensive shopping experience, entertainment centers, and a vibrant seaside district.
Robinsons Place Manila (Less than 1 min walk) – A massive shopping mall with countless dining, shopping, and entertainment options right at your doorstep.

With easy access to public transport, major roads, and business hubs, our place is the perfect base to explore Manila. Book your stay for the ultimate mix of convenience, comfort, and city adventures!

listing_name: Green Residences Stays In Metro Manila by PBYY 811
description:
Thank you for choosing Green Residences Stays by PBYY for your upcoming stay. We are delighted to have you as our guest and are eager to provide you with a delightful experience. 

Our 1 BR with balcony condo unit, situated in one of SMDC's prestigious condominiums, offers hotel-like accommodations in the heart of Metro Manila. We take pride in our prime location, providing simplicity and authenticity to enhance your stay.

The space
Welcome to Stays at Green Residences with Balcony! We are thrilled to have you with us and are committed to ensuring that your stay is both comfortable and convenient. 

Situated within the lively Malate district in Manila, our condo unit offers a range of amenities to enhance your experience. The air-conditioned unit features a balcony with sea and city views, providing a relaxing atmosphere during your stay. Our 24-hour front desk, lift, and complimentary WiFi aim to make your time with us seamless and enjoyable. The non-smoking property is conveniently located just 1.5 km from Manila Bay Beach. 

The apartment itself comprises 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV with streaming services, a dining area, and a fully equipped kitchen. Additionally, a terrace with sea views and a patio doubling as an outdoor dining area add to the charm of our unit. 

Our team places a high priority on cleanliness and security, striving to create a cozy atmosphere that feels like home within the heart of Metro Manila.

Guest access
Please send all guest valid ids for us to process your check in pass.
For local residents, a clear and non-expired government ID is required, while foreigners are requested to provide a clear copy of their passport. Please ensure that the identification documents are valid and unexpired.

Our unit is part of a complex with hotel-like amenities, including a grand lobby, outdoor swimming pool (please refer to our policies), and 24/7 convenience stores and restaurants nearby. Long-term guests ( 6 months or more ) can also enjoy additional facilities like the student lounge, game room, and wellness center (gym). Please coordinate property for amenities policy . Please note that our amenities policy is subject to change without prior notice. If you have any questions or require assistance, don't hesitate to reach out to our property management team.

*SWIMMING POOL ( Under maintenance until April 8 , 2024 or until further notice . )

Valued Guests,

POOL USE FOR LAST MINUTE BOOKING DONE ON SATURDAYS & SUNDAYS AND HOLIDAYS:

Be reminded that pool use is
subject to additional charges:

150php per person per day (regular days)
300php per person per day (holidays)

Pool use are requested to our building admin. As such, we require you to submit your request a day before so we can process it ahead of time. Take note that our building admin do not work on holidays, Saturdays and Sundays. On Friday, we can only process it until 3:00 P.M. only. Make sure you inform us of your requests before the holidays and weekend. If you want to use the pool, please don’t hesitate to contact us.

Note: Mondays are reserved for pool maintenance. Swimming cannot be scheduled throughout the day.

Other things to note
Dear Valued Guest,

We hope this message finds you well. We would like to inform you about our electricity setup in our units.

Our units' electricity is powered by an electronic "KURYENTE LOAD" (LOADABLE) system provided by our electric power provider. In our commitment to providing you with the best accommodation rates and promoting energy conservation, we have set a daily electricity load limit.

For our staycation guests, we have allotted Php 100.00 worth of electricity load per day. This amount is consumable and can be multiplied depending on the duration of your stay. Once the allotted load is consumed, guests will be responsible for shouldering the additional electricity load.

For long-term guests staying for 28 days or more, we will initially allot Php 3,000 worth of electricity load. Once this load is consumed, guests will then be responsible for covering the cost of the electricity load beyond the initial allotment.

We kindly ask for your cooperation and understanding in conserving energy during your stay. Your cooperation not only helps in preserving our environment but also allows us to continue offering competitive accommodation rates.

Should you have any questions or concerns regarding our electricity load policy, please do not hesitate to reach out to our front desk or management team. We are here to assist you and ensure you have a comfortable and pleasant stay with us.

*INCIDENTAL DEPOSIT
We collect incidental deposit of Php 3,000 upon check in, this deposit is fully refundable upon check-out if not utilized and subject to a damage inspection of the accommodation.

-Smoking is not allowed in the entire building, there is a Php 3,000 penalty.
-Pets are not allowed, penalty of Php 5,000
-Paid Parking nearby and in the premises is subject for availability and at your own risk

listing_name: Beautiful Home Overlooking View of Manila 100 mbps
description:
NORDIC DREAM - 43rd floor, complete and compact home with a fully functioning kitchen, can sleep four people.

INSTAGRAM WORTHY. Breathtaking views overlooking Manila and Makati skyline, with the beautiful Manila Bay sunset. Perfect for stargazing or for a relaxing night.

ACCESSIBILITY - We are at the centre of Manila tourism. 20+ tourist spots are all minutes away. Airport Terminal 3 is 16 minutes away.

MODERN SUITE CONCEPT. May be rented out with 6 other units in the same building.

The space
Unique for its homey vibe. Feels just like home, you aren’t constrained into sleeping as if in a traditional hotel.

Cooking your favourite meal with loved ones, a movie marathon all night with kids or friends, a swimming event... all possible here!

City Centre. We are located next to De La Salle University. Quirino LRT Station is a minute walk. Biggest DLTB bus station connecting North to South of Philippines is 5 minutes away. Airport Terminal 3 is 16 minutes away. Mall of Asia is 13 minutes away. The Walled City Intramuros is 10 minutes away.

If you look it up, all 50 other major destinations and tourism attractions in Manila City are few minutes away.

Also share the beautiful experience with 6 more families, we have 6 more units in the building you and your family can reserve for your next get away.

Secure that spot. Book now.

Guest access
Swimming pool is open 6AM to 10PM daily, with a minimal Php150 maintenance fee per head, to be paid at the Admin Office before 6PM Weekdays & for weekend guests, please inform us, as we will need to advance purchase your pool passes.

Study area is open 24/7, perfect as a co-working space and for Bar or Boards reviewers.

You have a shopping grocery mall inside your building — SM Green Mall.

Pay mall parking is available at Floor P1. Php40 for the first 2 hours, Php40 every succeeding hour, plus Php300 for overnight rate.

Open pay parking is at the back of your building, next to Starbucks.

Other things to note
Self check-in is possible 24/7.

Right after booking, please send valid IDs of all staying guests. This is for your gate pass.

Lost, damaged or stolen key or access cards, will result in a 1,500 pesos fee payable by the guest for each item

The Administration Office is open until 6PM, closed during legal and non-working holidays.

Please book hours before 6PM or before any holiday to avoid gate pass or entry problems at the lobby.

listing_name: Green Residences Stays In Metro Manila  by PBYY 85
description:
Thank you for considering Green Residences Stays by PBYY! We’re excited to welcome you to our cozy 1 BR condo located in a prestigious SMDC building beside De La Salle University. Ideal for students, professionals, and travelers, it offers hotel-like comfort in the heart of Manila. Nearby spots include PGH, St. Luke's, US Embassy, Rizal Memorial Stadium, and Adventist Medical Center. Plus, enjoy easy access to Jollibee, 7-Eleven, local restaurants, and Green Mall downstairs. See you soon!

The space
Welcome to Our Accommodation!

We are thrilled to have you and want to ensure that your stay is both comfortable and convenient.

Our fully air-conditioned unit is thoughtfully furnished with everything you need for a relaxing visit. The kitchen is equipped with utensils and cooking essentials, including an electric water heater for your convenience. The room features a Smart TV and we provide reliable internet access, with the Wi-Fi password shared upon check-in.

For a restful night, our bedroom features 2 single beds with pull out and has pillows and blankets. You’ll find ample storage space, an electric iron, and a vanity cabinet for your personal use. The private bathroom is fully equipped with a water heater, bidet, and complimentary toiletries available at check-in. Fresh towels and toilet paper are provided for your first use, along with clean slippers for added comfort.

We prioritize cleanliness and security while creating a cozy home-like atmosphere in the heart of Metro Manila. Enjoy free Wi-Fi, free linens, and fresh towels throughout your stay, with 24/7 on-call staff ready to assist you at any time.

If you have any further questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out. We hope you have a wonderful stay with us!

Guest access
Check-In Requirements:

Local Residents: A clear, non-expired government ID is required.
Foreign Guests: A clear copy of a valid passport is necessary.
Please ensure all IDs are valid and unexpired to process your check-in pass.

Amenities Overview:

Our unit is located in a complex with hotel-like amenities, including:

Grand Lobby
Outdoor Swimming Pool (subject to policies)
For long-term guests (6+ months), additional amenities include:

Student Lounge
Game Room
Wellness Center (Gym)
Note: Amenities policies may change without prior notice. For further details, please coordinate with property management.

Swimming Pool Use:

Last-Minute Bookings (Saturdays, Sundays, Holidays):

Pool use is subject to additional charges:
₱150 per person per day on regular days
₱300 per person per day on holidays
Pool Use Requests:
Requests must be submitted a day in advance for processing by the building administration. Keep in mind:

Admin office hours:
No work on holidays, Saturdays, or Sundays.
Requests on Fridays must be submitted before 3:00 PM.
Pool maintenance on Mondays:
No swimming allowed throughout the day.
If you plan to use the pool, feel free to contact us to ensure your request is processed on time.

Other things to note
Electricity Setup

We would like to inform you about our electricity setup in our units. Our electricity is powered by an electronic "KURYENTE LOAD" (LOADABLE) system provided by our electric power provider. In our commitment to offering you the best accommodation rates and promoting energy conservation, we have established a daily electricity load limit:

Staycation Guests: An allotment of Php 100.00 worth of electricity load per day is provided. This amount is consumable and can be multiplied depending on the duration of your stay. Once the allotted load is consumed, guests will be responsible for any additional electricity charges.

Long-Term Guests: For stays of 28 days or more, an initial allotment of Php 3,000 worth of electricity load will be provided. Once this load is consumed, guests will be responsible for covering the cost of any electricity usage beyond the initial allotment.

We kindly ask for your cooperation and understanding in conserving energy during your stay. Your efforts in energy conservation not only help preserve the environment but also enable us to maintain competitive accommodation rates.

Should you have any questions or concerns regarding our electricity load policy, please do not hesitate to reach out to our front desk or management team. We are here to assist you and ensure a comfortable and pleasant stay.

Incidental Deposit

An incidental deposit of Php 3,000 is collected upon check-in. This deposit is fully refundable upon check-out if not utilized, subject to a damage inspection of the accommodation.

Policies

Smoking: Smoking is not allowed in the entire building, with a penalty of Php 3,000 for violations.
Pets: Pets are not allowed, with a penalty of Php 5,000 for violations.

listing_name: Larger 4th Level WIFI AC rooftop deck
description:
Located on the 4th floor of our dedicated building, this studio has a private bathroom and private kitchen.

Located a short distance from Intramuros, the Divisoria and Binondo China Town, close to US Embassy, Dept of Immigration, SM Manila etc).

Room is private room with 1 x double and 1 x single beds, own kitchenette / own bathroom / own 43 inch smart TV with streaming / window with street view.

You will love the roof top deck for dining, relaxing or taking pictures of the area.

The space
This apartment has two independent bedrooms with AC - space is about the same size as two small hotel rooms, about 45 square meters. Modern and secure. We have CCTV installed on the building entrance and corridors like a modern hotel for safety.

Beds are very comfortable from BLIMS upscale furniture store, and sheets 100% cotton from SM Department Stores. All bedding is professionally cleaned after use by our sister company BELLA WASH LAUNDRY. For long stays we will arrange bedding to be washed periodically during your stay by advanced arrangement with you.

Note 1: If you require a baby crib during your stay please advise us in advance as these are stored outside the room.

Note 2: If your dates are not available on this listing as we are already booked on your required dates, check out the following listings also on Airbnb located in the same building:

Guest access
The main transportation in the community is tricycle, which goes to 2 different routes 1. Divisoria- a commercial center in Tondo, Manila known for its shops that sell low-prices goods. 2. Pier South, this terminal is walking distance to Intramuros a historic must be visited place, a home to Spanish era. Pier south is also your way from Baseco if you are heading to National Museum, Mall of Asia and Airport side. If required we have a private car with a driver who can take you to your destination for a small fee.

Other things to note

listing_name: Green Residences Stays In Metro Manila by PBYY 910
description:
Thank you for choosing Green Residences Stays by PBYY for your upcoming stay. We are delighted to have you as our guest and are eager to provide you with a delightful experience.

Our 1 BR condo unit, situated in one of SMDC's prestigious condominiums, offers hotel-like accommodations in the heart of Metro Manila. We take pride in our prime location, providing simplicity and authenticity to enhance your stay.

The space
Welcome to our accommodation! We are excited to have you and want to ensure your stay with us is as comfortable and convenient as possible.

Our fully air-conditioned unit is thoughtfully furnished to meet all your needs. The kitchen is equipped with utensils and cooking essentials, and an electric water heater is provided for your convenience. The living area boasts an entertainment set with cable television, and we offer a reliable internet connection, the password for which will be provided upon check-in.

For a restful night, our bedroom has 1 couples bed size 54x75 and 1 single bed with pull out bed. Ample storage space, an electric iron, and a vanity cabinet are also available for your use. The bathroom is equipped with a water heater and bidet, and toiletries will be provided upon check-in. Fresh towels and toilet paper are complimentary for your first use, and we've included clean slippers for your comfort.

Cleanliness and security are our top priorities, and we strive to create a cozy atmosphere that feels like home within the heart of Metro Manila.

If you have any further questions or need assistance during your stay, please don't hesitate to reach out. We hope you have a wonderful time with us!

Guest access
Please send all guest valid ids for us to process your check in pass.
For local residents, a clear and non-expired government ID is required, while foreigners are requested to provide a clear copy of their passport. Please ensure that the identification documents are valid and unexpired.

Our unit is part of a complex with hotel-like amenities, including a grand lobby, outdoor swimming pool (please refer to our policies), and 24/7 convenience stores and restaurants nearby. Long-term guests ( 6 months or more ) can also enjoy additional facilities like the student lounge, game room, and wellness center (gym). Please coordinate property for amenities policy . Please note that our amenities policy is subject to change without prior notice. If you have any questions or require assistance, don't hesitate to reach out to our property management team.

*SWIMMING POOL ( Under maintenance until April 8 , 2024 or until further notice . )

Valued Guests,

POOL USE FOR LAST MINUTE BOOKING DONE ON SATURDAYS & SUNDAYS AND HOLIDAYS:

Be reminded that pool use is
subject to additional charges:

150php per person per day (regular days)
300php per person per day (holidays)

Pool use are requested to our building admin. As such, we require you to submit your request a day before so we can process it ahead of time. Take note that our building admin do not work on holidays, Saturdays and Sundays. On Friday, we can only process it until 3:00 P.M. only. Make sure you inform us of your requests before the holidays and weekend. If you want to use the pool, please don’t hesitate to contact us.

Note: Mondays are reserved for pool maintenance. Swimming cannot be scheduled throughout the day.

Other things to note
Dear Valued Guest,

We hope this message finds you well. We would like to inform you about our electricity setup in our units.

Our units' electricity is powered by an electronic "KURYENTE LOAD" (LOADABLE) system provided by our electric power provider. In our commitment to providing you with the best accommodation rates and promoting energy conservation, we have set a daily electricity load limit.

For our staycation guests, we have allotted Php 100.00 worth of electricity load per day. This amount is consumable and can be multiplied depending on the duration of your stay. Once the allotted load is consumed, guests will be responsible for shouldering the additional electricity load.

For long-term guests staying for 28 days or more, we will initially allot Php 3,000 worth of electricity load. Once this load is consumed, guests will then be responsible for covering the cost of the electricity load beyond the initial allotment.

We kindly ask for your cooperation and understanding in conserving energy during your stay. Your cooperation not only helps in preserving our environment but also allows us to continue offering competitive accommodation rates.

Should you have any questions or concerns regarding our electricity load policy, please do not hesitate to reach out to our front desk or management team. We are here to assist you and ensure you have a comfortable and pleasant stay with us.

*INCIDENTAL DEPOSIT
We collect incidental deposit of Php 3,000 upon check in, this deposit is fully refundable upon check-out if not utilized and subject to a damage inspection of the accommodation.

-Smoking is not allowed in the entire building, there is a Php 3,000 penalty.
-Pets are not allowed, penalty of Php 5,000
-Paid Parking nearby and in the premises is subject for availability and at your own risk

description:
The Studio Apartment is 25sqm. on the 26th floor of the newly built 8 Adriatico Condominium in Malate, Manila. The Apartment features a modern decor. A fully furnished 25 square meter unit with a Queen sized bed, Bathroom, Kitchenette, Dining set, TV(basic local channels only), Strong Wi-Fi, Air Conditioning, and Basic Essentials.

The space
The place has a clean modern appeal with the following amenities.
- Queen sized mattress
- Table and desk
- Kitchen with microwave
- Basic cookware and Plates and spoons
- Clean bathroom with instant hot water heater.
- Wall mounted LCD TV with USB / HDMI connections
- Air conditioning
- Linens and towels for two
- Netflix, Youtube

Guest access
The apartment building provides Front Desk, Lobby, Security, Maintenance and Medical Clinic. Guests have access to the outdoor Swimming Pool and Gym Studio.

Other things to note
The place is located next to Robinsons Place Mall, the largest mall in the area with plenty of shops, restaurants and a supermarket.

Guests can easily reach historical and cultural attractions like the Manila Bay and Rizal Park within a 10-15 minute walk. It is a 10-15 minute drive to Manila Ocean Park, National Museum of the Philippines, Cultural Center of the Philippines, Mall of Asia, Ferry Terminal to Corregidor Island, and to the famous “Walled City" of Intramuros -a must see! Rent a horse carriage or join a bamboo bike tour in Intramuros to explore the cobblestone streets and Spanish-era architectures of San Agustin Church and Museum, Manila Cathedral and Fort Santiago. The best way to end your day in Intramuros is by watching a cultural show with dinner at Barbara's Restaurant or enjoy dinner and drinks at Sky Deck on Bayleaf Hotel overlooking historic Manila.

listing_name: 1BR Near Beach, Airport & In City of Manila Bay
description:
Enjoy a comfortable stay in the heart of Malate, Near Casino Metro Manila, where city life meets coastal charm. This cozy condo is just a short walk from Roxas Boulevard Baywalk, the U.S. Embassy, and a variety of restaurants, cafés, like Jollibee and Chowking. Whether you’re visiting for business or leisure, you’ll love being close to from shopping and cultural spots to vibrant nightlife and seaside views. After a day of exploring, home to a relaxing space designed for rest and convenienc

The space
Nestled along Roxas Boulevard in Malate, Near Biggest Casino in the Philippines Okada & City of Dream. Your stay at Admiral Suites offers you instant access to Manila’s most vibrant mix of dining, scenic parks, and urban entertainment. Just steps from your door are renowned restaurants like The Aristocrat (a local legend for hearty Filipino meals) and Aling Fely’s BBQ & Bakeshop, plus inviting casual spots such as McDonald’s and Sze Chuan House for Chinese fare. For elevated dining and sunset views, don’t miss the rooftop Admiral Club Manila Bay and Coconut Grove, both part of the Admiral Hotel complex, which blend excellent food with sweeping Manila Bay vistas.

If you’re in the mood for greenery and relaxation, you’ll find Rizal Park (Luneta) just a few minutes away by car—a sprawling historical park ideal for walks, picnics, or catching the changing light over the bay. Closer still is the serene Arroceros Forest Park, a quiet urban forest walk right in the city, offering a peaceful escape. For shopping, entertainment or a fun evening out, the bustling SM Mall of Asia is only a short drive, while the lively Baywalk along Roxas Boulevard is perfect for sunset strolls, street food, or simply watching the city lights reflect on Manila Bay

Enjoy a relaxing stay in our comfy unit that fits up to 4 guests. It features a queen bed, sofa bed, kitchen, air conditioning, washing machine, and a 50” Smart TV with Netflix.

We’re right across the U.S. Embassy and close to Dolomite Beach, St. Luke’s Extension Clinic, and Robinsons Place Manila.

Grab what you need anytime at the 24/7 Mini Stop or 7-Eleven beside the building, or walk a few meters to Starbucks, Coffee Bean, Army Navy, Pancake House, and nearby Chinese restaurants and Bars night life.

listing_name: Green Residences Stays In Metro Manila by PBYY1011
description:
Thank you for choosing Green Residences Stays by PBYY for your upcoming stay. We are delighted to have you as our guest and are eager to provide you with a delightful experience.

Our studio unit, situated in one of SMDC's prestigious condominiums, offers hotel-like accommodations in the heart of Metro Manila. We take pride in our prime location, providing simplicity and authenticity to enhance your stay.

The space
Welcome to our accommodation! We are excited to have you and want to ensure your stay with us is as comfortable and convenient as possible.

Our fully air-conditioned unit is thoughtfully furnished to meet all your needs. The kitchen is equipped with utensils and cooking essentials, and an electric water heater is provided for your convenience. The living area boasts an entertainment set with cable television, and we offer a reliable internet connection, the password for which will be provided upon check-in.

For a restful night, our very affordable place is a 16 Square meter Studio Unit with 2 single bed. Ample storage space, an electric iron, and a vanity cabinet are also available for your use. The bathroom is equipped with a water heater and bidet, and toiletries will be provided upon check-in. Fresh towels and toilet paper are complimentary for your first use, and we've included clean slippers for your comfort.

Cleanliness and security are our top priorities, and we strive to create a cozy atmosphere that feels like home within the heart of Metro Manila.

If you have any further questions or need assistance during your stay, please don't hesitate to reach out. We hope you have a wonderful time with us!

Guest access
Please send all guest valid ids for us to process your check in pass.
For local residents, a clear and non-expired government ID is required, while foreigners are requested to provide a clear copy of their passport. Please ensure that the identification documents are valid and unexpired.

Our unit is part of a complex with hotel-like amenities, including a grand lobby, outdoor swimming pool (please refer to our policies), and 24/7 convenience stores and restaurants nearby. Long-term guests ( 6 months or more ) can also enjoy additional facilities like the student lounge, game room, and wellness center (gym). Please coordinate property for amenities policy . Please note that our amenities policy is subject to change without prior notice. If you have any questions or require assistance, don't hesitate to reach out to our property management team.

*SWIMMING POOL ( Under maintenance until April 8 , 2024 or until further notice . )

Valued Guests,

POOL USE FOR LAST MINUTE BOOKING DONE ON SATURDAYS & SUNDAYS AND HOLIDAYS:

Be reminded that pool use is
subject to additional charges:

150php per person per day (regular days)
300php per person per day (holidays)

Pool use are requested to our building admin. As such, we require you to submit your request a day before so we can process it ahead of time. Take note that our building admin do not work on holidays, Saturdays and Sundays. On Friday, we can only process it until 3:00 P.M. only. Make sure you inform us of your requests before the holidays and weekend. If you want to use the pool, please don’t hesitate to contact us.

Note: Mondays are reserved for pool maintenance. Swimming cannot be scheduled throughout the day.

Other things to note
Dear Valued Guest,

We hope this message finds you well. We would like to inform you about our electricity setup in our units.

Our units' electricity is powered by an electronic "KURYENTE LOAD" (LOADABLE) system provided by our electric power provider. In our commitment to providing you with the best accommodation rates and promoting energy conservation, we have set a daily electricity load limit.

For our staycation guests, we have allotted Php 100.00 worth of electricity load per day. This amount is consumable and can be multiplied depending on the duration of your stay. Once the allotted load is consumed, guests will be responsible for shouldering the additional electricity load.

For long-term guests staying for 28 days or more, we will initially allot Php 3,000 worth of electricity load. Once this load is consumed, guests will then be responsible for covering the cost of the electricity load beyond the initial allotment.

We kindly ask for your cooperation and understanding in conserving energy during your stay. Your cooperation not only helps in preserving our environment but also allows us to continue offering competitive accommodation rates.

Should you have any questions or concerns regarding our electricity load policy, please do not hesitate to reach out to our front desk or management team. We are here to assist you and ensure you have a comfortable and pleasant stay with us.

*INCIDENTAL DEPOSIT
We collect incidental deposit of Php 3,000 upon check in, this deposit is fully refundable upon check-out if not utilized and subject to a damage inspection of the accommodation.

-Smoking is not allowed in the entire building, there is a Php 3,000 penalty.
-Pets are not allowed, penalty of Php 5,000
-Paid Parking nearby and in the premises is subject for availability and at your own risk

description:
Stay in the absolute centre of Manila when you book this chic, spacious, and fully-equipped residence unit in Malate, adjacent to New World Manila Bay Hotel and Casino, the Marina Residential Suites. Located right next door to the center of nightlife, and a few minutes away to Intramuros, Robinsons Mall, and Ocean Park. The space
The apartment is a 64sqm 1-bedroom layout that features a well-equipped kitchen with marble counter, modern Japanese-style bathroom with deep soaking tub, and a bedroom with king-sized bed.High speed (25 Mbps) wireless internet is accessible throughout the apartment.

Bedroom - The bedroom is fitted with a king size, high quality bed and mattress, guaranteeing you a great night's sleep.

listing_name: 100Mbps+Netflix: Moroccan Theme Overlooking Manila
description:
Beautiful Moroccan-themed apartment at the 42nd floor, with overlooking view of Manila. Boutique studio with its own mall, swimming pool, gym, 24/7 co-working space, restaurants.

Great for business or leisure travelers. 50 Mbps internet speed with Netflix.

Five-star location, perfect for tourism. 15 minutes away from Airport Terminal 3, Mall of Asia, historical Intramuros. 3-minute walk to the train station.

Modern suite concept, may be rented out with ten units in the same building.

The space
UNIQUE. Instagrammable Moroccan accents with a beautiful night view of the touristy Manila. See the Mall of Asia and Star City lights from your window.

BUILD MEMORIES. A romantic candle light table setup may be requested with balloons surprise setup. For family gatherings, function room at the top floor can accommodate 150 guests, room with 180 degree unobstructed panoramic view of Manila Bay.

5-STAR LOCATION. Your building, SMDC Green Residences, is 15 minutes away from NAIA Terminal 3 Airport, Spanish walled-city Intramuros, Mall of Asia, casinos at Okada Manila, etc.

CONVENIENCE. Boutique studio apartment equipped with everything a business or leisure traveler needs. 50 Mbps internet speed and free Netflix, mall inside your building, swimming pool access, 5-minute walk to the train station to easily connect you from North to South of Metro Manila, and a whole lot more!

Guest access
Swimming pool may be accessed from 6AM to 10PM, with a minimal daily fee of Php150 per head.

Pool is now available.

15pax fully vaccinated people max at a time.

Open Tuesday to Sunday
6AM to 10PM

Guest access is paid po.
Non holiday - 150 pesos per person
Holidays - 300 pesos per person

Pool payment can be made at the administration office located on P5, or if staying Saturday or Sunday night, we will need to prepay it on your behalf. Payment must be sent to us by Friday morning for us to process.

Fitness gym and study area are exclusive to owners and long term tenants. Short term renters may be allowed use after a notarial contract fee of Php1500.

Other things to note
SMDC Green Residences
AIRBNB GENERAL POLICIES:

Welcome to Airbnb, the biggest internet-based home-sharing. We would like to keep it clean and insect free. Please observe the following:

(1) Checkin is 2PM, Checkout is 10AM. Extensions are highly discouraged because this will affect our cleaning and sanitizing hours. We need 3 hours at least for cleaning. As courtesy to next guest, please checkout on time.

(2) After booking, please send here valid ID’s of all staying guests. We can’t give you building access cards without your ID’s.

(3) You may self checkin, you may also do a late checkin (but never a late checkout). We will give you the passcode once booking is confirmed.

(4) If there is no electricity, that means breaker is off. To turn back on, breaker is at the back of the main door, lift leftmost lever up. Do not touch the other levers please.

(5) This building runs on prepaid electricity, we only have a budget of Php150 per day. Help us conserve energy for Mother Earth.

(6) Before you checkout, please send us pictures of repairs/breakage e. g. clogged drains, leaking bidet, busted light bulb, etc. We need to fix them before next guest arrives at 2pm.

(7) When using the microwave, please use the plug next to stove.

(8) Garbage Room is next to the elevator. Throw your garbage daily.

(9) This is not a motel, it is our family home. If you stain linens and towels, please bring to laundromat located at the back of the the building. As courtesy to our home, use bleach for the whites to remove stains.

(10) To avoid cockroaches, please wash your soiled dishes regularly.

(11) Only monthly bookings get free weekly cleans. If you’re staying for less than a month, you may request 1.5 hour house cleaning for Php450. If you’d like house cleaning with linen and towel change, the rate is Php750.

(12) We do not live in the building, we can’t accept same day bookings on Philippine holidays.

(13) Swimming pool is free for owners and long-term tenants. For short stay guests, pool fee is Php150 per head per day, to be paid at the Administration Office before 6PM. For long term tenant free pool use, documentation and notary fee is P1500.

(14) Gym use is free for owners and long term tenants. For short stay guests, there are huge fitness gyms outside the building.

(15) Admin Office is closed during holidays.

(16) The temporarily RFID Card given to your guest by lobby receptionist is only valid for 24 hours. If your visitor exceeds the 24-hour validity, penalty charge is Php1500 per card.

(17) Please do not misplace/lose your RFID card, replacement is very pricey. It is Php1500 per lost card, this is to cover notary and documentation fees.

(18) You have two options for parking. (a) Pay parking inside the building is Php40 for the first 2 hours, Php20 for every succeeding hour, plus Php300 for overnight, (b) pay fenced parking is at the back of the building, next to Starbucks.

(19) We are a small business, your 5-star rating will help our family. Thank you in advance for the 5-star review, and for your kindness.

(20) Our goal: Airbnb SuperHost. We recommend placing the negative comment/s as a private message, we promise to act on them the soonest.

(21) Airbnb is a home-sharing concept, this is not a hotel, motel, inn, hostel. We try our best to give the most comfortable stay, please refrain from giving very low star ratings for factors we cannot control as owners, i. e. weather in the Philippines, flooded roads, Metro Manila traffic, location of building, security policies of the building, view of the room, etc.

Thanks for taking time to read.

Enjoy your stay!

listing_name: Modern Studio Apartment w/Manila Bay View Sunset
description:
(beside Robinson’s Manila) (near U.S. Embassy and St. Luke’s Medical Center Extension Clinic) Fully furnished 25 square meter unit on the 21st floor with the stunning view of Manila bay in 8 Adriatico Condominium Padre Faura Street, Ermita, Manila corner Bocobo st. The studio apartment feature tasteful decor in modern neutrals. It is located at the center of Manila's Entertainment and Tourist Landmarks.

The space
This location is ideal for those who are attending appointments at the U.S. Embassy, which is around 10 minutes walk or 3 minutes taxi ride and the St. Luke’s Medical Center Extension Clinic, which is a 2 minutes walk from the apartment building. also ideal location within 25 minutes drive from Manila Ninoy Aquino International Airport Terminals. It is situated beside the largest Robinsons Mall with plenty of shops, restaurants and a supermarket. The country’s capital is full of culture and history. Guests can easily reach the Manila Bay and Rizal Park within a 10-15 minutes walk. It is a 10-15 minutes drive to Manila Ocean Park, National Museum of the Philippines, Cultural Center of the Philippines, Mall of Asia, Ferry Terminal to Corregidor Island and to the famous “Walled City" of Intramuros -a must see! Rent a horse carriage or join a bamboo bike tour in Intramuros to explore the cobblestoned streets and Spanish-era architectures of San Agustin Church and its Monastery Museum a UNESCO World Heritage Site, Manila Cathedral and Fort Santiago. End the day with a buffet lunch or cultural buffet dinner show at Barbara's, or enjoy dinner and drinks at Sky Deck on Bayleaf Hotel overlooking historic Manila. All these popular landmarks are very accessible from here and many more…

Guest access
The apartment building provides Front Desk, Lobby, Security, Maintenance and Medical Clinic. The Guests have free access to the outdoor Swimming Pool and Gym Studio. 
NEW GOOGLE TV
(Netflix, Youtube and more)✅
Netflix ready but you need to sign-in on your own account.

- Check in time 2PM. Self check-in instructions will be sent accordingly.
- Check out time 12 Noon. 
- Swimming Pool (6th Floor) is open between 6AM-9PM 
- Fitness Center (6th Floor) is open between 6AM-9PM

Kindly ensure that guest must log their name prior using the center.

Other things to note
Our listing can accommodate a maximum of 3 persons, ideally 2 adults and 1 kid. The rate posted here is for 2 persons only. If more than 2 will be staying, kindly indicate this in your booking request. Rates will be adjusted accordingly.

You must also acknowledge No parking on property - There is an outdoor Pay Parking Lot along Bocobo Street, located right at the back of the apartment building.

listing_name: Great location!  Spacious 1 BR w/ Queen Bed (ML05)
description:
Stay in the absolute centre of Manila when you book this chic, spacious, and fully-equipped residence unit in Malate, adjacent to New World Manila Bay Hotel and Casino, the Marina Residential Suites. Located right next door to the center of nightlife, and a few minutes away to Intramuros, Robinsons Mall, and Ocean Park. From fun, vibrant nightspots, to historical attractions, you’ll definitely enjoy a unique experience here paired with Manila Bay breathtaking view from the roof deck.

The space
The apartment is a 64sqm 1-bedroom layout that features a well-equipped kitchen with marble counter, modern Japanese-style bathroom with deep soaking tub, and a bedroom with king-sized bed. The unit has a wifi connection of up to 16mbps internet speed depending on the location is provided.

Bedroom - The bedroom is fitted with a king size, high quality bed and mattress, guaranteeing you a great night's sleep.

Kitchen - Modern with marble counter, comes with everything you need should you wish to do any cooking. A 4-hob cooktop allows you to knock up some meals when you don't fancy eating out. Includes microwave, electric kettle, pans, full complement of crockery and cutlery and all the cookware necessary to make a gourmet meal. A heavy duty washer / dryer is also placed in the kitchen.

Bathroom - The marble bathroom comes with a deep soaking tub with rain shower facilities. You may also experience the modern Japanese-style washlet installed in the toilet.

The Building - Marina Residential Suites consists of a 30-storey residential and hotel building. It has a full range of amenities including an outdoor pool, gym, and sauna, all available at the roof deck.

Guest access
Guests have access to the whole apartment, as well as the amenities at the roof deck area.
These include:

* Gym
* Swimming pool
* Sauna

Other things to note
Requests for late check-in or early check-out are accommodated whenever possible.

The common areas of the building may look a bit aged, but you’ll be happy with everything inside the unit since it’s all newly - furnished.
To those guests who paid at a regular rate, a complimentary cleaning of the unit will be offered at a convenient time for you. For the guests who wish to stay longer than a week, I can offer up to 5% OFF for minimum 7 days and 10% OFF for 30 days and more.

I do offer unit cleaning service ( that includes changing of bed linens ) which will be done by my housekeeper with a fee of Php700 per request or an option to change the bed sheets and towels for only Php500.

Calendar for the next few weeks have been filling in quite fast. Be sure to send me a message to guarantee a reservation. :)

Bath Towel - 1 towel per guest (depend on the confirmed booking) - Extras: P100 /towel

listing_name: Japanese Animé House in Historic Manila 100 Mbps
description:
Japanese themed interiors, set in relaxing earth tones. Zen ambiance from a combination of bamboo wood, sakura florals, and authentic wooden accents.

Experience floor seating dining with our tatami floor carpet and floor cushions. Complete Japanese dining utensils for your afternoon tea party or dine-in sushi and unlimited ramen in chopsticks.

Located at the heart of tourism. 20 minutes away from historic Intramuros, 20 minutes away from Okada casino district, 15 minutes from the airport.

The space
UNIQUE. Boutique themed home, in modern suite concept. Can be rented out with 10 other units in the building, perfect for your family events. 30 Mbps WiFi with free Netflix access, great for both work and leisure travelers.

CITY-CENTRE. Building is a portal to Old Manila’s cultural and historical sites. The walled city of Intramuros and the famous Rizal Park are only 20 minutes away. The National Museum (17-minute distance) the Cultural Center of the Philippines (8 min away), and the Metropolitan Museum of Manila (15 min away) are all accessible from this address.

5-STAR LOCATION. Guests love staying at SMDC Green Residences for convenience and value for money. There is a mall inside the building, grocery shopping at the ground floor, Starbucks and Bo’s Coffee at the back of the building etc.

TOURISM HUB. Quirino train station is a stone’s throw away, travel from North to South of Metro Manila traffic-free. Visiting the 7,641 islands of the Philippines by land is also made possible, biggest bus station DLTB Gil Puyat Avenue is 10 minutes away.

SPACE REINVENTED. Hotel spring semi-double mattress with pull out bed. Tatami mat or floor mattress for extra guests.

Guest access
Swimming pool with deck overlooking beautiful Manila lights, is located at the 8th floor, open from 6AM to 10PM daily. Rate is at P150 per head daily, free for owners and long term tenants.

24/7 study area, game room, and fitness gym are at the 53rd floor. Exclusive to owners and long term-tenants.

Short term guests may use these amenities for free upon a lease contract signed on checkin date, with P1500 documentation fee. Minimum stay for this to apply is 1 month

Other things to note
(1) For your security access cards, please send pictures of your valid ID’s right after booking confirmation. ID for each guest is needed.

(2) Same day booking on a Philippine holiday is not possible. Admin Office needs to approve on every Airbnb guest. Admin is closed on holidays, and is open 9AM to 6PM on regular days.

(3) The ID of your visitor is only valid for 24 hours. Failure to return will cost you P1500. Non-paying guests are not allowed to sleepover in this room. Our prior approval is required.

(4) You are not allowed to duplicate the key. This is against our security policy.

(5) After booking, please read carefully our 25-point Checkin Instructions.

Located right next door to the center of nightlife, and a few minutes away to Intramuros, Robinsons Mall, and Ocean Park. The space

description:
This private room is located a few metres from the Port overlooking the container area - a short distance from Intramuros, the Divisoria and Binondo China Town, close to US Embassy, Dept of Immigration, SM Manila etc).

Room has two single beds, is a private room with own kitchenette / bathroom / 32 inch smart TV with streaming. Room is exclusive to you.

While you are staying with us you will love the roof top deck for dining, relaxing or taking pictures of the surrounding areas.

The space
Girlie’s place is located in Manila, Metro Manila, Philippines.

This is unique traveller experience, if you are looking for an insight into how locals live Port Side Manila, this is the place where you can experience the vibrancy of the Manila people and life.

It's a bustling community, busy during the day, quiet at night (after 9 or 10pm). A Laundrette open 6am till 8pm daily. Kiosks are open 24/7 and a small bakery from early morning.

Be inspired by the entrepreneurship and enterprise of this small community which has a village atmosphere, within the Metro Manila area.

Guest access
The main transportation in the community is tricycle, which goes to 2 different routes 1. Divisoria- a commercial center in Tondo, Manila known for its shops that sell low-prices goods. 2. Pier South, this terminal is walking distance to Intramuros a historic must be visited place, a home to Spanish era. Pier south is also your way from Baseco if you are heading to National Museum, Mall of Asia and Airport side. If required we have a private car who can take to your destination for a fee.

Other things to note
Overnight street parking is challenging to locate, please coordinate with our caretaker who may be able to help you locate.

listing_name: House of Citiflora B w/ Roofdeck & Karaoke
description:
Welcome to your Manila escape! This stylish 4-level townhouse on the edge of Makati promises an unforgettable stay. Relax on the rooftop terrace with stunning views, enjoy movie nights on the Smart TV, or showcase your talent with our karaoke setup. Please note that the multiple flights of stairs may not be ideal for seniors and small children. Dive into vibrant local culture while enjoying the comforts of home. Book now for a unique urban experience in this charming neighborhood!

The space
Welcome to your Manila escape! This stylish 4-level townhouse on the edge of Makati promises an unforgettable stay, perfect for big families or groups. Spanning 200 sqm, it exudes charm with several flights of stairs that may not be ideal for seniors, guests with mobility concerns, or small children. The townhouse accommodates up to 8 guests with 2 parking space. The first floor features an indoor garage, shoe rack, dining area, kitchen, kitchenette, and bathroom, all with ceiling fans for added comfort. The second floor offers a cozy living/karaoke room, Bedroom 1 with a double bed, and a shared bathroom. The third floor includes Bedroom 2 with a double bed, Bedroom 3 with 2 double beds, and a shared bathroom. The fourth floor boasts Bedroom 4 with a double bed, a bathroom, and access to the rooftop with a dining setup for enjoying breathtaking views. All bedrooms are air-conditioned for your comfort.

Relax in the inviting bedrooms with comfortable beds, ample closet space, and study desks. The fully equipped kitchen allows you to prepare your own meals, or you can opt for food deliveries. Complimentary condiments, mineral water, and towels are provided. Game boards like Bingo, Chess, Scrabble, Jenga, and Dart Pins are available upon request. Experience vibrant local culture and the comforts of home in this charming neighborhood.

Smart TV Entertainment Options: Stream & Chill in Every Room!

• Dining Room:
Local Channel
• Living Room:
Karaoke, Youtube & Netflix
Built-in Account
• Room 1:
No TV
• Room 2:
YouTube & Netflix Ready
Inter Your Own Account
• Room 3:
YouTube & Netflix Ready
Inter Your Own Account
• Room 4:
No TV

Guest access
Guests will have access to the following areas of the space:

- Indoor garage
- Shoe rack
- Smoking area (rooftop and garage)
- Dining area
- Kitchen and kitchenette
- Living/karaoke room
- 4 Bedrooms
- 4 Bathrooms
- Rooftop

Other things to note
Our property is located in a typical Manila residential area, offering you the opportunity to meet and connect with the friendly locals in the neighborhood. The surroundings are simple yet vibrant, with plenty of mini stores and carinderias nearby. Just a short walk will bring you to the bustling main roads of Makati and Manila.
While the several flights of stairs add charm to the space, they may not be ideal for seniors, guests with mobility concerns, or small children.
Since acquiring the house in 2016, we’ve had no issues with the security or safety of the property or the community. In fact, our caretaker and cleaners are friendly neighbors who help keep everything running smoothly. We're also proud to share that 20% of your payment goes toward a scholarship program for indigent students in Araceli, Palawan. Your stay is making a meaningful difference!

listing_name: Adria Residences - RUBY Garden - 2 Bedroom Unit
description:
Adria Residences delivers redefined Service Apartment Experience crafted through our distinct yet evolving hospitality encapsulated in our most personal service, functional space & elegant ambience. Our place provides convenience brought by close proximity to shopping malls, entertainment destinations, Government agencies. Our place is right at the center of the Tourist Area. Live like Locals and experience the night life surrounding the area with hundreds of restaurants and bars to choose.

The space
Each of our 4 houses is a 2 bedroom unit and it comes with residential features and designed to deliver impeccable comfort and convenience confined within timeless interiors and intricate details. Each house has its own living room complimented with a 49" LED Smart TV, dining table complete with cutleries for 4 persons, Fully Functional Kitchen with basic kitchen utensils for you to cook your own meal. It has 2 Toilet and bath for more convenience and privacy. Our place is situated in the buzzling Malate district but once you are inside, it will immediately transform your senses and give you a serene feeling of nature and garden embracing you.

Guest access
Once you are inside our townhouse / apartment, you can frequent the hanging garden area and feel nature enveloping your senses after a busy hectic day from work or strolling. You may also conduct photoshoots in the Garden and hallway area perfect for civil wedding, wedding preps , birthday celebrations or just simply for instagram.

Other things to note
My place is located in the heart of Adriatico, the main tourist belt area of Manila. Surrounded by numerous dining options, you will never run out of choices for your meals. Nearby restaurants include David's Teahouse, Upstage Bar, Gokizip, Samgyupsal, Mak Chang, Figaro Coffee, Cafe Adriatico, Korean Palace, Salo, Bistro Remedios, Big Bang Cafe, Tongkeunso, Tanabe Japanese Restaurant, Hue Massage, and many more.

The property is just two blocks away from Robinsons Place Manila, the largest mall in the city. Major attractions are also easily accessible: it's a 20-minute drive to Mall of Asia, City of Dreams Casino, Solaire Casino, and Okada Manila. Additionally, it's only 8 minutes to the US Embassy, Intramuros, Manila Hotel, and Ocean Park. For public transportation, the nearest LRT station is a 5-minute walk away, and taxis are readily available in the vicinity.

We offer a convenient shuttle service from the airport to our place at a reasonable price. This service saves you the hassle of finding a cab upon arrival, helping you save time and providing added comfort. If you are interested, please message us in advance to arrange the details.

For your convenience, we offer on-site laundry service at a reasonable price, saving you the hassle of going out to find a laundromat.

description:
